 - The applicant should be a Building/ Construction Worker.
 - The applicant should be between 18 and 60 years.
 - The applicant should have engaged in building and construction work for at least 90 days in a given year.

> **For the Application of the Welfare Scheme:**

 - The applicant should be a registered member Under the Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board of West Bengal.
 - The member should have been hospitalized for 5 or more days or became disabled/permanently disabled due to an accident.

scheme_name: Agricultural Extension
eligibility_text_source:
1. The scheme is open to the following categories of candidates of the age group of 18 to 60 years.
1. Graduates in agriculture and allied subjects like Horticulture, Sericulture, Dairy, Animal Husbandry, Fisheries, Home/ Community Sciences, Biotechnology, Agricultural Engineering, Forestry, Food Technology, Food Nutrition, and Dietetics, etc, from SAUs/ Central Agricultural Universities/ Universities and graduates in Environmental Science, Botany, Zoology and Chemistry recognized by ICAR/ UGC. Degrees in Agriculture and allied subjects offered by other agencies are also considered subject to the approval of the Department of Agriculture & Cooperation, Government of India on the recommendation of the State Government.
1. Diploma (with at least 50% marks)/ Post Graduate Diploma holders in Agriculture and allied subjects (as in para 3.1) from State Agricultural Universities, State Agriculture and Allied Departments and the State Department of Technical Education. Diplomas in Agriculture and allied subjects offered by other agencies (autonomous bodies, UGC affiliated universities, etc.) are also considered subject to the approval of the Department of Agriculture & Cooperation, Government of India on the recommendation of the State Government.
1. Post Graduation in Agriculture & allied subjects.
1. Degree courses recognized by UGC have more than 60 percent of the course content in Agriculture and allied subjects 3.5. 
1. Diploma/ Post-graduate Diploma courses with more than 60 pe

scheme_name: Art Exhibition Assistance in the State
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a resident of Gujarat.
 1. The applicant should have received formal art education or should have conducted a previous individual or group art exhibition.
 1. The applicant should organize an exhibition within Gujarat.
 1. The applicant should exhibit a minimum of 30 artworks in the sponsored exhibition.

scheme_name: Assistance for Exhibitions Abroad and Out of State
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be an artist originally from Gujarat.
1. The applicant must have organized either:

 - Individual Artists: Artists practicing in fields of visual arts (painting, sculpture, printmaking, etc.) who wish to participate in or organize exhibitions outside Gujarat or internationally.
 - Registered Art Organizations or Groups: Art societies, academies, educational institutions, or cultural organizations that promote visual arts and are organizing such exhibitions.

1. Applicants must exhibit a minimum of 30 original artworks at the exhibition for which financial assistance is being sought
1. The exhibition must be:

 - Outside the State (interstate exhibitions), or
 - Outside the Country (international exhibitions abroad), and
 - Must be art-related, such as showcasing paintings, sculptures, mixed media, or visual art forms.

scheme_name: Academic Education (JKBOCWWB)
eligibility_text_source:
> **For Registration as a Building/ Construction Worker -** 

1. The applicant should be a resident of Jammu & Kashmir.
1. The applicant should be a Building/ Construction Worker.
1. The applicant should be between 18 and 60 years.
1. The applicant should have engaged in any building or other construction work for at least 90 days during the preceding 12 months.
1. The registration of the applicant should be renewed annually.

> **For Application to this Scheme -** 

1. The parent/s must be registered member/s of the "Jammu & Kashmir Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board".
1. The parent/s must have an active membership with the JKBOCWW Board.
1. The child must be a student.
1. The child must be a regular in attendance.

scheme_name: Arivu Education Loan Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The student should belong to the State Religious Minority Community.
1. The student should be a permanent resident of the State.
1. The annual income of the family should not exceed ₹8,00,000/-.

scheme_name: Abhinandan Education Loan Subsidy Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. It is mandatory for the student to be a permanent resident of the state of Assam.
1. The student must have taken a loan from a commercial or rural bank, otherwise, he cannot avail of the benefit of the scheme.
1. The bank has been recognized by the Reserve Bank of India.
1. The benefit of this scheme can be availed only as a subsidy on education loans.
1. It is mandatory for the student’s parents to have an education loan of more than Rs 1 lakh.

scheme_name: Agriculture Engineering (Mechanical) Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a resident of Meghalaya.
1. The applicant should be a bonafide farmer engaged in agriculture.

scheme_name: Assistance for Establishment of On farm Storage for Sorting-Grading
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be a resident of Gujarat.
 - The applicant should be a farmer.

scheme_name: Allowance To Eunuchs Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident/domicile of Haryana State and has been residing in Haryana State for the last 5 years at the time of submission of the application.
1. The age of the applicant should not be less than 18 years.
1. The applicant must give a certificate from the Civil Surgeon in support of being an Eunuch.
1. The applicant should not be involved in any unlawful activity.

scheme_name: "Assistance for Energy and Water Conservation" under "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries - Various Incentives"
eligibility_text_source:
- All the Micro, Small, Medium and Large Industries are eligible.
- The Unit should have made the investment on or after 1st April 2017.
- The unit should provide at least 60% of employment to the people of the Union territory of Puducherry of the total employment strength of the industrial units. This 60% of the local employment will have to be maintained by the industrial unit during the period specified in the Affidavit.
- The unit should have achieved saving in energy/water minimum by 10% of average monthly consumption of previous 12 months before conduct of audit.
- The audit should have been conducted in the unit by a recognized institution/consultant.
- The industrial unit shall not transfer or dispose of the fixed asset including plant and machinery in any manner till the completion of 5 years from the date of submitting the application/disbursement of the subsidy whichever is later.
- The additional investments made by the new/existing industrial units after availing the first claim are also eligible for subsidy up to the ceiling limit.

*The date of commencement as admitted by the entrepreneurs shall be reckoned after due verification by the officials of the Industries Department.
> **Special Cases**

If, two or more industrial undertakings are set up by the same person as proprietor, common partners, common Board of Directors/shareholders, such units are eligible for subsidy as separate entity provided the location of the unit are different and licenses /clearances

scheme_name: Assistance for Area Expansion in Fruit crops
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be a resident of Gujarat.
 - The applicant should be a farmer.

scheme_name: Assistance for Area Expansion of Spice Crops
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a farmer.
 1. The applicant must be engaged in the cultivation of spice crops, such as seed spices or rhizomatic spices.

scheme_name: To Assist the Farmers for Construction of Community Base Water Tank/Storage Structure for Efficient Use of Water Through Drip Irrigation
eligibility_text_source:
> **For Individual Farmers:**

- The applicant must be a farmer.
- The applicant must belong to the Gujarat state.
- The water tank must be constructed on the applicant’s own farmland.
- The farmer must have adopted the [Micro Irrigation System (MIS)](https://pib.gov.in/PressReleaseIframePage.aspx?PRID=2003188).- The farmer must cover at least one hectare of land per 75 cubic meters of water tank under MIS.

> **For Group of Farmers:**

- The group must consist of two or more farmers.
- The group must belong to the Gujarat state.
- The group must select one farmer as the leader, who will submit the application on behalf of the group.
- The water tank must be constructed on the land of one of the farmers in the group.
- Each member of the group must have adopted the [Micro Irrigation System (MIS)](https://pib.gov.in/PressReleaseIframePage.aspx?PRID=2003188).- The group must cover at least one hectare of land per 75 cubic meters of water tank under MIS.

> **Note:**

- No separate registration is required for the group; they only need to submit a mutual consent certificate.
- The benefit is available only once in a lifetime (For both Individual and Group of Farmers).

scheme_name: Assistance for Cattleshed, Gaman, Water Tank and Bucket
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a farmer.
 1. The applicant should belong to the Schedule Caste category.
 1. The applicant must own land or have a minimum 10-year lease agreement.

scheme_name: Assistance for Cultivation of Medicinal/ Aromatic Crops
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a farmer.
 1. The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat.
 1. Applicant must possess cultivable land ranging from 0.20 hectares to 4 hectares.

scheme_name: Assistance for Daughter's Marriage
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a native of Rajasthan.
 1. The applicant should be the widow of an ex-serviceman of the rank of Havildar or below.
 1. The assistance is available for a maximum of two daughters of the widow of an ex-serviceman.
 1. The daughter should be at least 18 years of age at the time of marriage.
 1. The daughter’s name should be duly recorded in the ex-serviceman’s discharge book or Part-2 order.
 1. The applicant should possess a valid Ex-Serviceman/Widow Identity Card issued by the respective District Sainik Welfare Office.
 1. The applicant should not have received marriage assistance for the same purpose from the Kendriya Sainik Board.
 1. The application should be submitted within one year from the date of marriage to be eligible for assistance under this scheme.
 1. Widows of ex-servicemen who are classified as Battle Casualties or Physical Casualties (attributable cases) are not eligible under this scheme, as marriage assistance in such cases is provided by the Army Headquarters.
 1. If the applicant is eligible for the Daughter Marriage Assistance Scheme run by the Kendriya Sainik Board for ex-servicemen, then financial aid from the Amalgamated Fund shall not be granted.
 1. The benefit shall be extended only to the widow of an ex-serviceman who meets the definition of an ex-serviceman as prescribed by the Government of India.

scheme_name: Financial Assistance for Daughter's Marriage (UKBOCWWB)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a construction worker registered with the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
 1. Financial assistance is available for the worker’s own marriage and for the marriage of up to two daughters.

scheme_name: Financial Assistance For Procuring Mobility Equipment To Disabled Ex-Servicemen (All Ranks)
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be an Ex-Serviceman.
- The applicant should be disabled after retirement from the service.
- The percentage of the disability should be 50% or more.
- The applicant should not be covered under a similar scheme of the Army/Navy/Air Force.
- The application of the applicant should be recommended by the respective Zila Sainik Board (ZSB).
- The applicant should be capable of personally utilizing the mobility equipment provided.

scheme_name: AFFDF-Financial Assistance For Treatment Of Serious Diseases To Non Pensioner Ex-Servicemen (All Ranks)/Widows
eligibility_text_source:
- Applicant must be a non-pensioner ESM or his widow.
- Should not be a member of ECHS (Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme) or availing AFMS (Armed Forces Medical Services) facilities.
- Should be recommended by respective Zila Sainik Board (ZSB).
- Expenditure must be incurred at a approved govt hospital at the rates applicable under CGHS (Central Government Health Scheme) / ECHS.

scheme_name: Assistance for Funeral Expenses (O.B.O.C.W.W.B)
eligibility_text_source:
> **For Registration as a Building/ Construction Worker:**

 - The applicant should be a resident of Odisha.
 - The applicant should be a Building/ Construction Worker.
 - The applicant should be between 18 and 60 years.
 - The applicant should have engaged in building and construction work for at least 90 days in a given year.
 - The applicant should not be a member of any other Welfare Fund established under any law.

> **For the Application of the Welfare Scheme:**

 - The applicant should be a nominee of a deceased registered member Under the Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board of Odisha.
 - The member should have lost his/her life due to death.

scheme_name: Assistance for Funeral Rites
eligibility_text_source:
- The beneficiary should be a resident of Tamil Nadu.
 - The beneficiary should belong to the SC/ST (Adi Dravidar/Tribal) community.
 - The beneficiary should have lost any of his/her family members due to death.

scheme_name: Inter-Caste Marriage Award
eligibility_text_source:
**Eligibility Criteria for Inter-Caste Marriage Award:**

1. The applicant must be a permanent resident of Himachal Pradesh.
1. The age of the couple should not exceed 50 years.
1. The marriage must be registered under the applicable Act/Rules.
1. The applicant should not have received any Inter-Caste Marriage Award earlier.

scheme_name: Rules Related to Madhya Pradesh State Disease Assistance Fund
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a domicile of Madhya Pradesh.
1. The applicant must belong to a Below Poverty Line (BPL) family.
1. The applicant must be suffering from a [disease listed](https://www.health.mp.gov.in/sites/default/files/siaf-approved-rate-list-2018.pdf) among the approved illnesses under the scheme.1. The hospital must be a recognized institution within or outside Madhya Pradesh.
1. Only one eligible family member can receive assistance once.

scheme_name: Assistance for Marriage
eligibility_text_source:
**Eligibility for differently abled person:**

1. The applicant should be a differently abled person.
1. The differently abled person shall have attained the age as prescribed by law for marriage.

**Eligibility for son or daughter:**

1. The children of differently-abled person should be holding identity card.

scheme_name: Assistance to Farmers for Mini Tractor and Power Tiller in Farm Mechanization Program
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be a farmer.
 - The applicant should be a resident of Gujarat.
 - The applicant should be engaged in agricultural practices and require mechanization support.
 - The applicant should intend to purchase either a mini tractor up to 20 HP, or a power tiller (either above or below 8 BHP).

scheme_name: Assistance for Protected Cultivation
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a resident of Gujarat.
 1. The applicant should be a farmer.

scheme_name: Assistance for Power Driven Chaff Cutter scheme
eligibility_text_source:
- The scheme is applicable to General, Scheduled Caste (SC), and Scheduled Tribe (ST) individuals.

- The applicant must be engaged in dairy farming.

scheme_name: Assistance to Farmers to Purchase Heavy Farm Equipment (Tractor)
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be a landholding farmer.
 - The applicant should belong to the Gujarat state.

 - The applicant must purchase the Tractor from an [authorized dealer](https://ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in/Public/frm_Public_DealerDetails.aspx).
> **Note:**

 - Beneficiary farmers can receive the benefit of one tractor component per land record (8 A).
 - Among the holders of a land record mentioned in 8-A, if there is more than one farmer, only one of these farmers will get benefits.
 - If a farmer holds multiple land records or has a name in multiple land records, the benefits will be availed by the farmer on a single land record only.
 - The benefits are available once every 10 years per land record.

scheme_name: Assistance For Purchase of Aids/Appliances
eligibility_text_source:
1. Annual income of the applicant from all sources should not exceed ₹1,50,000/- per annum.
 1. Applicant must be resident of UT, Chandigarh for more than 3 years.
 1. Applicant's Disability should be to the extent of 40% and above.

scheme_name: Assistance for Purchase of Bi-cycle (O.B.O.C.W.W.B)
eligibility_text_source:
> **For Registration as a Building/ Construction Worker:**

 - The applicant should be a resident of Odisha.
 - The applicant should be a Building/ Construction Worker.
 - The applicant should be between 18 and 60 years.
 - The applicant should have engaged in building and construction work for at least 90 days in a given year.
 - The applicant should not be a member of any other Welfare Fund established under any law.

> **For the Application of the Welfare Scheme:**

 - The applicant should be a registered member of the Odisha Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
 - The applicant should have deposited up-to-date annual contributions for three years to the Board.

scheme_name: Assistance for Purchase of Safety Equipment (O.B.O.C.W.W.B)
eligibility_text_source:
> **For Registration as a Building/ Construction Worker:**

 - The applicant should be a resident of Odisha.
 - The applicant should be a Building/ Construction Worker.
 - The applicant should be between 18 and 60 years.
 - The applicant should have engaged in building and construction work for at least 90 days in a given year.
 - The applicant should not be a member of any other Welfare Fund established under any law.

> **For the Application of the Welfare Scheme:**

 - The applicant should be a registered member of the Odisha Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
 - The applicant should have deposited up-to-date annual contributions for one year to the Board.

scheme_name: Assistance for Quality Enhancement
eligibility_text_source:
All Micro and Small Enterprises existing anywhere in Rajasthan will be required to comply with the following conditions to avail benefits under the scheme:

 1. The enterprise will be required to have Udyam Registration Certificate (URC) as per MSME Development Act 2006.
 1. The enterprise should apply for the one-time reimbursement within 12 months of obtaining the quality certification/(s).
 1. Cost of certification will include documentation, testing, accreditation fee, consultation fee, and calibration charges (till the enterprise obtain the certificate), application fee, license fee and other relevant fees.
 1. Certification should be related to the product or process of the enterprise.
 1. The enterprise should be in commercial production at the time of disbursement and the assistance shall not be released to the closed unit.
 1. One MSME enterprise can apply only once under the scheme.

scheme_name: Ambedkar Fellowship Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a native of Rajasthan.
1. The applicant should belong to the Scheduled Caste (SC) category.
1. The applicant should have completed a postgraduate degree with at least 55% marks.
1. The applicant should be below 35 years of age at the time of application.
1. The applicant's annual family income should not exceed ₹2,50,000/- from all sources.
1. Priority is given to candidates enrolled in central or state government universities in Rajasthan.
1. A maximum of two children from a single family (parents/guardians) can apply under the scheme.
1. The applicant should have secured admission in a Ph.D. program in a recognized university in Rajasthan in one of the following subjects:

- Sociology
- Public Administration
- Law
- Economics
- Political Science
- Anthropology

***Other terms & conditions:***

 1. The selected candidate will have to submit a certificate regarding admission from the Head of the concerned University or Institute in which he/she is pursuing Ph.D.
 1. Candidates selected for Ph.D. will have to submit certificate regarding attendance as prescribed by University Grants Commission (UGC).
 1. Every year a progress report of the research work done by the student will be submitted to the department and after completion of the research work a copy will be made available to the department also.
 1. In case the amount received as fellowship is misused by the student, the amount paid along with 10% interest will be recovered from the concerned

scheme_name: Award for Success in State Public Service Commission, Union Public Service Commission Examination (MPBOCWWB)
eligibility_text_source:
**For Registration**

1. The applicant should be a resident of Madhya Pradesh.
1. The applicant should be a Building/ Construction Worker.
1. The applicant should be between 18 and 60 years.
1. The applicant should have engaged in any building or other construction work for at least 90 days during the preceding 12 months.
1. The registration of the applicant should be renewed annually.

**For Application**

1. The applicant should be a son or daughter of a registered Building/ Construction Worker.
1. The applicant should be up to 45 years of age.
1. The applicant should be in possession of a valid identity card issued by the Labour Department.
1. The applicant should be selected at Preliminary or Main Level of either the "State Public Service Commission Examination" or the "Union Public Service Commission Examination".

scheme_name: Advocate Grant
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of the Kerala State.
2. The applicant should belong to the State Backward Community of Kerala State.
3. The applicant should be a Law Graduate.
4. The applicant should be enrolled as an Advocate in the Bar Council (Kerala).
5. The applicant should be started practice as an Advocate within the state shall alone be considered.
6. The annual family income of the applicant should be ₹1,00,000/-.
**Note 01:** Preference will be given to Below Poverty Line (BPL) candidates.
**Note 02:** Preference will be given to the applicant whose annual family income is less.
**Note 03:** If there is any tie, such cases shall be determined on the basis of the percentage of marks of the Law Degree.
**Note 04:** If still there is any tie, preference shall be given to the candidates who have obtained degrees in law from the Universities in Kerala.

scheme_name: All Goa Classical Dance Competition
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be a local student.
- The applicant should be between 12 and 20 years of age.

scheme_name: Assistance to General Farmers for Installation of Submersible / Centrifugal Motor Pumpsets With Accessories
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be from the General Category.
- The applicant should be a farmer in the Union Territory of Puducherry.
- The tubewell in which the submersible/centrifugal motor pump sets is going to be erect and should have been registered in Pondicherry Ground Water Authority, Puducherry.
- The applicant should hold a minimum of 1.5 acres of land under the command area of the tubewell to be constructed and the applicant should have ownership of the land at least for 2 years and should have a clear ownership title deed in his/her name. 
- The eligible land holding of 1.5 acres should be in favour of the applicant farmer or in favour of the spouse or favour of the member of a joint/undivided family.
- The farmers who have already availed themselves of the subsidy for the said purpose within 5 years are not entitled to any benefit under this scheme.
- The applicant should not convert the lands for a maximum period of 10 years from the date of construction of the tubewell/filter point to any purpose other than agriculture and should execute a bond accordingly.

scheme_name: Assistance to General Farmers for Sinking Tubewell
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must obtain the necessary permit to sink a new/replacement tubewell/filter point from Pondicherry Ground Water Authority, Puducherry.
- The tubewell/Filter point should have been constructed through a departmental power rig/hand bore set or should have been constructed with a No Objection Certificate of the Agriculture Department for engaging private drilling machinery registered with Pondicherry Ground Water Authority under departmental supervision.
- The applicant should hold a minimum of 1.5 acres of land under the command area of the tubewell/filter point to be constructed.
- The applicant should have ownership of the land for at least 2 years and a clear ownership title deed in his/her name. The eligible land holding of 1.5 acres should be in favour of the applicant farmer, spouse, or a member of the joint/undivided family.
- Farmers who have already availed themselves of the subsidy for the same purpose within 5 years are not entitled to any benefit under this scheme.
- The casing pipes should have a BIS certificate and should have been purchased from an authorized dealer/ M/s.PASIC Ltd.
- The applicant should not convert the lands for a minimum period of 10 years from the date of construction of the tubewell/filter point to any purpose other than agriculture and should execute a bond accordingly.

scheme_name: Ashramshalas (Grant in Aid)
eligibility_text_source:
##### ***For Ashramshalas (Educational Institutions)***

- The Ashramshala must enrol a minimum of 15 boys and 15 girls for the first time on inception.
- The Ashramshala must enrol a minimum of 10 boys and 10 girls every year till 7th standard after the inception year.
- The Ashramshala must be operated by a Non-Governmental Organization working in tribal areas.
- The Ashramshala must be located within any district of Gujarat.
- The Ashramshala must provide education for standards 1st to 8th (Ashramshala), standards 9th to 10th (Uttar Buniyadi Ashramshala), or standards 11th to 12th (Uchchattar Uttar Buniyadi Ashramshala).

##### ***For Students (Beneficiaries)***

- The applicant must belong to the Scheduled Tribe category.
- The applicant must be seeking admission to an Ashramshala for education from standard 1st to standard 12th.

scheme_name: Atal Graha Jyoti Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must be a resident of Madhya Pradesh.
 - The applicant must be a domestic consumer with a monthly electricity consumption of up to 150 units.
 - The applicant must have an approved load of 1 kilowatt for their electricity connection.

scheme_name: Annal Gandhi Memorial Award
eligibility_text_source:
- The beneficiary should be a resident of Tamil Nadu.
 - The beneficiary should be a Student.
 - The beneficiary should belong to the SC/ST (Hindu Adi Dravidar) community.
 - The beneficiary must have secured the first rank in plus 2 Public Examinations in their district.

scheme_name: Amit Gautam Memorial Scholarship (B.Tech in Electronics Engineering – 4th Year)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a student.
 1. The applicant must be enrolled in the 4th year of the B.Tech (Electronics Engineering) course at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar.
 1. The scholarship is awarded for a duration of one year only.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Assistance for Quality Certification
eligibility_text_source:
1. The firm must be a Micro/Small/Medium enterprise.
 1. The enterprise must have obtained acknowledgment or registration from the Ministry of MSME or the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), as applicable.
 1. New manufacturing enterprises or existing ones undertaking expansion or diversification are eligible.
 1. The enterprise must commence commercial production during the scheme's operative period.
 1. Applications must be submitted within one year of the certification date.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Assistance for Saving in Consumption of Energy and Water
eligibility_text_source:
1. The firm must be a Micro/Small/Medium enterprise in the service sector.
 1. The enterprise must have obtained acknowledgment or registration from the Ministry of MSME or the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), as applicable.
 1. Enterprises must have undergone an energy/water audit conducted by a recognized institution/consultant to qualify for the audit reimbursement.
 1. Enterprises must demonstrate a minimum 10% reduction in energy/water consumption, based on the audit findings, to qualify for equipment assistance.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Assistance in Rent to MSEs
eligibility_text_source:
1. Only Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs) involved in manufacturing activities are eligible.
 1. The enterprise must have obtained acknowledgment or registration from the Ministry of MSME or the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), as applicable.
 1. The enterprise should have a valid rent deed or lease agreement for the shed used for manufacturing activities.
 1. The manufacturing activity should consume electricity/power for its operations.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Assistance for Patent Registration
eligibility_text_source:
1. Micro/Small/Medium enterprises or Individuals are eligible for assistance under the scheme.
 1. The enterprise must have obtained acknowledgment or registration from the Ministry of MSME or the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), as applicable.
 1. The applicant shall have to submit application within one year from the date of publication/notification of the patent.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Assistance for Technology Acquisition
eligibility_text_source:
1. The firm must be a Micro/Small/Medium enterprise.
 1. The enterprise must have obtained acknowledgment or registration from the Ministry of MSME or the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), as applicable.
 1. New manufacturing enterprises or existing ones undertaking expansion or diversification are eligible.
 1. The enterprise must commence commercial production during the scheme's operative period.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Assistance of Capital Investment Subsidy to Micro enterprises
eligibility_text_source:
1. The firm must be a Micro/Small/Medium enterprise.
 1. The enterprise must have obtained acknowledgment or registration from the Ministry of MSME or the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), as applicable.
 1. The enterprise must be a new manufacturing enterprises or existing enterprises undertaking expansion or diversification. 
 1. The enterprises should have commenced commercial production during the operative period (October 5, 2022, to October 4, 2027).
 1. Applications must be submitted online within one (1) year of the first loan disbursement date, the date of commercial production commencement, or the GR issue date, whichever is later, and before the scheme's last operative date.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Assistance for Interest Subsidy to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprise (Manufacturing Sector)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The firm must be a Micro/Small/Medium enterprise.
 1. The enterprise must have obtained acknowledgment or registration from the Ministry of MSME or the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), as applicable.
 1. New enterprises or existing enterprises undertaking expansion or diversification are eligible.
 1. The enterprise must commence commercial production or rendering services during the scheme's operative period.
 1. The enterprise must submit an application online within one year of the first loan disbursement, commencement of commercial production/services, or GR issue date, whichever is later.
 1. Applications must be submitted before the scheme's last operative date.
 1. The enterprise must pay regular installments and interest to the bank/financial institution.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Assistance for Interest Subsidy to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprise (Service Sector)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The firm must be a Micro/Small/Medium enterprise in the service sector.
 1. The enterprise must have obtained acknowledgment or registration from the Ministry of MSME or the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), as applicable.
 1. Only new MSME of Service sectors will be eligible for Interest subsidy on the term loan on new machinery, equipment, and furniture/fixtures (except land and building).
 1. The enterprise must submit an application online within one year of the first loan disbursement, commencement of commercial production/services, or GR issue date, whichever is later.
 1. Applications must be submitted before the scheme's last operative date.
 1. The enterprise must pay regular installments and interest to the bank/financial institution.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Net SGST reimbursement to Micro, Small and Medium Manufacturing Enterprise (MSMEs):
eligibility_text_source:
1. The firm must be a Micro/Small/Medium enterprise.
 1. The enterprise must have obtained acknowledgment or registration from the Ministry of MSME or the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), as applicable.
 1. New manufacturing enterprises or existing ones undertaking expansion or diversification are eligible.
 1. The enterprise must commence commercial production during the scheme's operative period.
 1. The subsidy is based on the lower of the Gross Fixed Capital Investment (GFCI) or the cost appraised by a bank or financial institution.
 1. Enterprises must obtain separate GST registration for manufacturing eligible products.
 1. Separate books of accounts are required for each manufacturing unit, certified by a Chartered Accountant.
 1. Incentives are only for goods manufactured in the eligible enterprise's premises, not for resold goods.
 1. Compliance with all reporting and reimbursement requirements is mandatory.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: EPF Reimbursement to MSMEs
eligibility_text_source:
1. The firm must be a Micro/Small/Medium enterprise.
 1. The enterprise must have obtained acknowledgment or registration from the Ministry of MSME or the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), as applicable.
 1. New manufacturing enterprises or existing ones undertaking expansion or diversification are eligible.
 1. The enterprise must commence commercial production during the scheme's operative period.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Assistance in Implementation of Information and Communication Technology
eligibility_text_source:
1. The firm must be a Micro/Small/Medium enterprise.
 1. The enterprise must have obtained acknowledgment or registration from the Ministry of MSME or the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), as applicable.
 1. New manufacturing enterprises or existing ones undertaking expansion or diversification are eligible.
 1. The enterprise must commence commercial production during the scheme's operative period.
 1. The scheme is available to all eligible enterprises that plan to implement ICT solutions, such as hardware for cloud computing and networking.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Assistance for Reimbursement of CGTMSE Fees
eligibility_text_source:
1. The scheme is open to Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs) that have availed a collateral-free term loan under the Credit Guarantee Scheme of CGTMSE.
 1. The MSE must apply to the concerned District Industries Centre (DIC) within one year from the first disbursement of the loan or before the date of commencement of commercial production (whichever is later).
 1. The enterprise must have paid the annual service fee for the CGTMSE-backed loan.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Rehabilitation of Sick Enterprise
eligibility_text_source:
1. The firm must be a Micro/Small/Medium enterprise.
 1. The enterprise must have obtained acknowledgment or registration from the Ministry of MSME or the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), as applicable.
 1. The enterprise must be a new manufacturing enterprises or existing enterprises undertaking expansion or diversification. 
 1. The enterprises should have commenced commercial production during the operative period (October 5, 2022, to October 4, 2027).
 1. The enterprise must be an MSME classified as a sick industrial enterprise per RBI guidelines.
 1. Diagnostic reports must be prepared by an expert or expert agency.
 1. The application must be submitted during the scheme's operative period.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Assistance for Power Connection Charges
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be registered as an MSME.
 1. The enterprise must have obtained acknowledgment or registration from the Ministry of MSME or the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), as applicable.
 1. The enterprise must be located outside GIDC/approved industrial parks.
 1. Charges must be paid to the distribution licensee during the scheme's operative period.
 1. Assistance applies to new power connections, additional load for expansion, or shifting of connection/service lines.
 1. Applications must be submitted within one year from the date of payment to the distribution licensee.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Assistance for Raising Capital through SME Exchange
eligibility_text_source:
1. Micro/Small/Medium enterprises that raise equity capital through an SME Exchange are eligible for assistance under the scheme.
 1. The scheme is open to MSMEs 
 1. The enterprise must have obtained acknowledgment or registration from the Ministry of MSME or the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), as applicable.
 1. The enterprise must submit the application within one year of its listing date on the SME Exchange.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Financial Support to MSMEs in ZED Certification
eligibility_text_source:
1. The firm must be a Micro/Small/Medium enterprise.
 1. The enterprise must have obtained acknowledgment or registration from the Ministry of MSME or the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), as applicable.
 1. New manufacturing enterprises or existing ones undertaking expansion or diversification are eligible.
 1. The enterprise must commence commercial production during the scheme's operative period.

scheme_name: All Goa One-Act Play Competition in Konkani
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must be an individual, club, or association.
- The applicant must present a One-Act Play in Konkani language.
- The applicant must ensure the play duration is not less than 35 minutes and not more than 45 minutes.
- The applicant must ensure participation only when at least 5 groups are participating in the competition.

scheme_name: AGR 2 (Farm Mechanization) Scheme Of Farmers Other Than SC/ST
eligibility_text_source:
- The beneficiary should be a permanent resident of Gujarat State.
- Any farmer of Gujarat state other than SC/ST (in 208 talukas where the Submissions on Agricultural Mechanization (SMAM) scheme is not implemented) is eligible under this scheme.
- The beneficiary farmer must purchase from the authorized manufacturer of the included manufacturer in the panels prepared for the purpose of periodic disclosed prize discovery by the Agriculture office/department.

scheme_name: AGR 3 (Farm Mechanization) Scheme For ST Farmers
eligibility_text_source:
- The beneficiary should be a permanent resident of Gujarat State.
- Any farmer of Gujarat State who belongs to the Scheduled Tribe category (in 208 talukas where the SMAM scheme is not implemented) is eligible under this scheme.
- In the areas of Talukas (Blocks) and Districts which are benefited/added under the Agriculture Support Program in Tribal Area Sub Plan & Dispersed Tribes (TASP) can get the benefit of this Scheme.
- The beneficiary farmer must purchase the agricultural equipment from the authorized manufacturer of the included manufacturer in the panels prepared for the purpose of periodic disclosed prize discovery by the Agriculture office/department.

scheme_name: AGR 4 (Farm Mechanization) Scheme For SC Farmers
eligibility_text_source:
- The beneficiary should be a permanent resident of Gujarat State.
- Any farmer of the state belonging to the Scheduled Caste category (in 208 talukas where the SMAM scheme is not implemented) is eligible under this scheme.
- The beneficiary farmer has to purchase from the authorized dealer of the manufacturer included in the panel prepared for the purpose of price discovery announced by the account from time to time.

scheme_name: AGR-50 Scheme-Assistance To Purchase Tractors
eligibility_text_source:
1. The beneficiary should be a permanent resident of Gujarat State.
 1. Any farmer of Gujarat state is eligible under this scheme.
 1. The beneficiary farmer has to purchase the empaneled tractor model of the manufacturer included in the empanelment prepared for the purpose of prize discovery announced by the agriculture department from time to time for tractors from their authorized dealer.

scheme_name: AGR-61 Agro Service Providers for the Purpose of Making Farming More Profitable With the Help of Farm Mechanization
eligibility_text_source:
> **Eligible entities:**

- Primary Agricultural Cooperative Society (PACS)
- Farmer Groups
- Farmer Producer Companies
- Cooperative Institutions
- Self-Help Groups (SHGs) and Sakhi Mandals

> **Eligible Individuals with relevant agricultural education:**

- Diploma in Agriculture
- Graduate in Agriculture
- Postgraduate in Agriculture
- Bachelor of Rural Studies (B.R.S.)

scheme_name: Arundhati Gold Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
**Eligibility**

1. The bride and groom should have attained the legal age of 18 years and 21 years respectively at the time of registration of the marriage. 
1. The marriage of the applicant should be registered under the Special Marriage Act, of 1954.
1. The applicant should have solemnised her marriage on or after the 1st of December, 2019.
1. The applicant should have registered her marriage on or after the 1st of January 2020.
1. The applicant girl should apply for the benefit under Arundhati Gold Scheme on the same day that she applies for marriage registration. 
1. The total income of the parents of the applicant girl should be below Rs 5.00 Lakh per annum.
1. The applicant girl can avail of this benefit for her first marriage only. 
1. Both the bride and the groom must have passed at least HSLC or equivalent Except Tea Tribe including Adivasi communities of the State. 
1. No minimum educational qualification is required in the case of Tea Tribe including Adivasi communities for the next five years, as most of the Tea Gardens in the State of Assam do not have High School facility

scheme_name: Advocate Graduate Stipend Gujarat
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a Scheduled Tribe (ST) youth.
1. The applicant should have completed LLB degree.
1. The applicant should have obtained a charter within two years of graduation.
1. The applicant should begin legal practice as a junior lawyer under a senior advocate.
1. The applicant should be practicing in tribal areas of Gujarat.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to Large Industries and Thrust Sector: EPF Reimbursement
eligibility_text_source:
1. A new large industrial undertaking, or an existing one that undertakes expansion and/or diversification, is eligible for this scheme.
 1. The large industrial undertaking must have obtained acknowledgment/registration, as the case may be from DPIIT. 
 1. The industry should commence commercial production during the scheme's operative period.
 1. Must have new employees (those who do not have a Universal Account Number or UAN prior to joining the undertaking).
 1. Must not have availed EPF reimbursement under any other central or state government schemes for the same period.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to Large Industries and Thrust Sector: Assistance of Interest Subsidy
eligibility_text_source:
1. A new large industrial undertaking, or an existing one that undertakes expansion and/or diversification, is eligible for this scheme.
 1. The large industrial undertaking must have obtained acknowledgment/registration, as the case may be from DPIIT. 
 1. The industry should commence commercial production during the scheme's operative period.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to Large Industries and Thrust Sector: Net SGST Reimbursement
eligibility_text_source:
1. A new large industrial undertaking, or an existing one that undertakes expansion and/or diversification, is eligible for this scheme.
 1. The large industrial undertaking must have obtained acknowledgment/registration, as the case may be from DPIIT. 
 1. The industry should commence commercial production during the scheme's operative period.
 1. Undertakings must have a separate GST registration for the eligible manufacturing unit.
 1. Compliance with SGST guidelines and no fraudulent reporting of sales.
 1. Only eligible goods manufactured in the premises qualify for reimbursement.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for Assistance to Mega Industries: Assistance of Interest Subsidy
eligibility_text_source:
1. The mega industry must operate as a manufacturing unit.
 1. The unit must have a minimum investment of INR 2,500 crore in plant and machinery.
 1. The unit must provide direct employment to at least 2,500 persons.
 1. The unit must belong to one of the thrust sectors as defined in the [Guidelines](https://cmogujarat.gov.in/sites/default/files/2023-01/AatmaNirbhar-Gujarat_Industrial-Policy_0.pdf) (Refer Page No. 9). 1. New industrial units or expansion projects are eligible.
 1. Units must avail of term loans for fixed capital investment from recognized financial institutions.
 1. The unit must bear at least 2% interest on term loans, even if availing of other subsidies.
 1. Units must ensure regular repayment of loan installments.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for Assistance to Mega Industries: EPF Reimbursement
eligibility_text_source:
1. The mega industry must operate as a manufacturing unit.
 1. The unit must have a minimum investment of ₹2,500/- crore in plant and machinery.
 1. The unit must provide direct employment to at least 2,500 persons.
 1. The unit must belong to one of the thrust sectors as defined in the [Guidelines](https://cmogujarat.gov.in/sites/default/files/2023-01/AatmaNirbhar-Gujarat_Industrial-Policy_0.pdf) (Refer Page No. 9). 1. Only new employees who do not have a Universal Account Number (UAN) before joining the unit are eligible.
 1. The reimbursement is only for incremental employee count post-expansion.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for Assistance to Mega Industries: Net SGST reimbursement
eligibility_text_source:
1. The mega industry must operate as a manufacturing unit.
 1. The unit must have a minimum investment of INR 2,500 crore in plant and machinery.
 1. The unit must provide direct employment to at least 2,500 persons.
 1. The unit must belong to one of the thrust sectors as defined in the [Guidelines](https://cmogujarat.gov.in/sites/default/files/2023-01/AatmaNirbhar-Gujarat_Industrial-Policy_0.pdf) (Refer Page No. 9). 1. The unit must obtain separate GST registration for the eligible products.
 1. The project must be a new industrial undertaking with commercial production started within the applicable period.
 1. The unit must comply with the conditions stated regarding sales classifications and documentation.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for Assistance to Mega Industries: Reimbursement of Stamp Duty and Registration Fees
eligibility_text_source:
1. The mega industry must operate as a manufacturing unit.
 1. The unit must have a minimum investment of ₹2,500/- crore in plant and machinery.
 1. The unit must provide direct employment to at least 2,500 persons.
 1. The unit must belong to one of the thrust sectors as defined in the [Guidelines](https://cmogujarat.gov.in/sites/default/files/2023-01/AatmaNirbhar-Gujarat_Industrial-Policy_0.pdf) (Refer Page No. 9). 1. The land must be purchased or leased during the eligible investment period.
 1. The unit must have commenced commercial production.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for Assistance to Mega Industries: Reimbursement of SGST Paid on Capital Goods
eligibility_text_source:
1. The mega industry must operate as a manufacturing unit.
 1. The unit must have a minimum investment of ₹2,500/- crore in plant and machinery.
 1. The unit must provide direct employment to at least 2,500 persons.
 1. The unit must belong to one of the thrust sectors as defined in the [Guidelines](https://cmogujarat.gov.in/sites/default/files/2023-01/AatmaNirbhar-Gujarat_Industrial-Policy_0.pdf) (Refer Page No. 9). 1. The capital goods must be acquired within the investment period specified under the scheme.
 1. The unit must have commenced commercial production within the timeline set by the scheme.

scheme_name: Antyodaya Gruha Yojana: Construction of New House
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant household must be residing in rural Odisha and must be houseless or living in a kutcha house.
 1. The applicant household should belong to at least one of the following categories:

 - Forest Rights Act, 2006 (FRA) beneficiaries.
 - Households where the main earning member is a Person with a disability with at least **40**% disability. - Lower-income households that are eligible but left out of existing Government rural housing schemes.

 1. The households coming under the following categories will be eligible forsanction of a new house, notwithstanding previous allotment of a house under any Government Housing Schemes and staying in a pucca house:

 - Households whose houses have been fully / severely damaged by natural/ manmade calamities like fire, flood, cyclone, earthquake, elephant menace, communal violence, LWE violence, major law and order problem, etc.
 - Victims ofriver / sea inundation who need relocation/shifting.
 - Households that are rehabilitated/relocated for setting up any Government projects, such as highways, irrigation projects, etc.
 - Households staying in sanctuary / reserve forest areas need relocation.

scheme_name: Antyodaya Gruha Yojana: Incentive to Beneficiaries
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a resident of the state of Odisha.
 1. The applicant must be a beneficiary of Pradhan Mantri Awaas Yojana (Gramin), PM-JANMAN, or any other Government-funded rural housing scheme.
 1. The applicant household must be residing in rural Odisha and must be houseless or living in a kutcha house.

scheme_name: Affordable Housing Component in Partnership of Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban) under Uttarakhand Housing Policy Rules, 2024
eligibility_text_source:
1. The beneficiary must have an annual income of less than ₹3 lakh.
 1. The beneficiary must be a citizen of India.
 1. The beneficiary must have been residing in Uttarakhand prior to 17.06.2015 (residence certificate must be provided).
 1. The beneficiary must not own a house anywhere in India.
 1. Registration must be completed on the portal of the Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs, Government of India: [https://pmaymis.gov.in/](https://pmaymis.gov.in/). 1. Registration can be done through the concerned Municipal Corporation office, Urban Development Office, or through Project Developers/Authorities.
 1. As per the Uttarakhand Housing Policy, only individuals whose registration has been completed on the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban) portal and who have been issued a Unique Identification Number are eligible for house allotment under this scheme.

scheme_name: Healthy Lifestyle for School Children through Ayurvidya-AYUSH
eligibility_text_source: 1. The beneficiary must be a student enrolled in a government school in Uttarakhand.

scheme_name: Akanksha Housing Scheme
eligibility_text_source: All serving State Govt. employees as defined in West Bengal Service Rules, except those State Govt. employees who have their own housing scheme such as `Pratyasha’ for Policemen or similar housing schemes under Government of West Bengal stated in Memorandum No. FD-647 dated 29th August, 2014 of the Finance Department of Govt. of West Bengal may apply for New Town Project under `AKANKSHA HOUSING SCHEME’ (AHS).

scheme_name: Pashu Palan Yojana (GSKVN)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a native of Gujarat.

eligibility_text_source:

scheme_name: Assistance for Installation of Sprinkler / Drip Micro Irrigation Systems
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be a Marginal Farmer/ Small farmer/ Scheduled Caste Farmer/ Schedule Tribe Farmer/ Women Farmer/ Big Farmers/ Institutions
- The farmers should own cultivable agricultural land in the Union Territory of Puducherry along with own/leased tubewell with adequate water and pumping system.
- The farmers who have already availed the maximum subsidy amount during the past 10 years for the sprinkler irrigation system and the past 8 years for the drip irrigation systems are not eligible.
- The farmers who have already installed micro irrigation system under this component and availed part of the maximum subsidy amount to install a micro-irrigation system during the past 10 years / 8 years in the additional area will be considered and they will be paid the balance amount duly deducting the already noted assistance from the maximum subsidy amount.
- The land in which the installation of the micro irrigation system under this component, the period of 10 years for the sprinkler irrigation system and 8 years for the drip irrigation system will not be considered even if ownership has been changed.
- Farmers who have availed of sprinkler irrigation systems earlier are also eligible for drip irrigation systems and vice‐versa, if the farmer opts to cultivate for intercrop for 3 years.
