scheme_name: Atal Mission For Rejuvenation And Urban Transformation
eligibility_text_source:
This is an open scheme and there is no eligibility required for the scheme.

Five hundred cities have been selected under AMRUT.

scheme_name: AICTE-Margdarshan scheme
eligibility_text_source:
> **For Margdarshan Institute or Mentor Institute(MI):**

 - The institution, i.e. university, institute, college should have been approved by AICTE. AICTE approval is not mandatory in case of Central Funded Institutions wherever applicable.
 - In case of AICTE approved institutions, MI must have got accreditation for consideration under the scheme. The Accreditation status for such programs should be valid for at least 6 moths from the date submission of the proposal.
 - **Institutions with other programmes:** AICTE approved institutions other than those of engineering like Management, Hotel Management, the accreditation status should be valid for at least 6 months from the date of making the application. - **Institutions with Diploma Courses:** An institute exclusively running the diploma courses can also submit the proposal for MI. There should be minimum four diploma courses running in the institute with valid accreditation status for at least 6 months from the date of making the application.> **For Mentee Beneficiary Institute (MBI):**

 - Only AICTE approved institutes are eligible to receive mentoring from MIs.
 - They have never been enrolled as Mls by AICTE.
 - They have never been mapped as MBI with any other MI.
 - None of their programs were accredited in the past ten years.

scheme_name: Award For Meritorious Students Of Meghalaya In The HSSLC Examination (Science Stream)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a tribal student belonging to the Khasi, Jaintia, Garo, Koch, or Hajong tribes of Meghalaya.
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of Meghalaya.
1. The applicant should have passed the current HSSLC Examination from the Science stream.
1. The applicant should have secured 60% or above aggregate marks in the examination.

scheme_name: Atma Nirbhar Bagwani Yojana
eligibility_text_source: The applicant must be a resident and farmer of Arunachal Pradesh.

scheme_name: The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Allowance to Destitute Women Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of the Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands or have resided in the Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands for more than 10 years at the time of making the application.
 1. The applicant should be a poor and destitute woman.
 1. The household income of the applicant does not exceed ₹4000/- per month.
 1. The applicant should not be availing of any kind of assistance or pension from the government.

scheme_name: The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Disability Allowance Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. Persons who are permanent residents of the Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands or have resided in the Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands for more than 10 years at the time of making the application. 
 1. A person of age 01 month or more and having 40% & above disability is eligible under the scheme.
 1. There is no income ceiling to avail this allowance.
 1. The applicant is neither in receipt of any other financial assistance/allowances nor employed anywhere.

> **Cancellation of Assistance:**

 - The sanctioning authority i.e. Director (Social Welfare) shall have the right cancel to the sanction of assistance at any stage if it is found that it was sanctioned on a mistaken ground or false information tendered or the conditions under which the assistance was granted no longer exist.
 - The assistance shall be stopped if the beneficiary gets employment.

scheme_name: The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Old Age Assistance Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of the Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands or have resided in the Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands for more than 10 years at the time of making the application.
 1. The age of the applicant should be 60 years or above.
 1. The household income of the applicant does not exceed ₹4000/- per month.
 1. The applicant should not be receiving any other financial assistance, pension, or grant from the government or any other source.

scheme_name: Andaman & Nicobar Islands Scheme for Health Insurance
eligibility_text_source:
The persons/patients of the following categories are eligible to avail the benefits under the scheme:

 1. The person who belongs to the BPL category settled in the A&N Islands can avail of the benefits under the scheme.
 1. The Government pensioners of the A&N Administration who have settled in these Islands after retirement with their dependent family members can avail of the benefits under the scheme.
 1. The permanent resident of the Andaman & Nicobar Islands whose family annual income is below ₹3.00 Lakhs can avail of the benefits under the scheme.

scheme_name: The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Widow Pension Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of the Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands or have resided in the Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands for more than 10 years at the time of making the application.
 1. The applicant should be a poor widow.
 1. The household income of the applicant does not exceed ₹4000/- per month.
 1. The applicant should not be availing of any other financial assistance or grant from the government or any other source.
 1. The applicant shall cease to receive the assistance if she gets remarried or becomes financially independent afterward, which may be divulged by due enquiry or through records.

scheme_name: Atma Nirbhar Krishi Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must be a resident of Arunachal Pradesh.
- The farmer should possess the necessary land for agricultural activities.
- Women farmers and members of self-help groups are also eligible to apply under the scheme.
- The applicant must have a viable plan or proposal for the proposed agricultural activities.
- Farmers must meet the specific criteria set by participating banks for loan eligibility.

scheme_name: Atma Nirbhar Matsya Palan Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
**Eligibility Criteria for Individual Farmers**

1. The applicant must be a Scheduled Tribe (ST) of Arunachal Pradesh.
1. The applicant must be a permanent resident of Arunachal Pradesh. 
1. The applicant must be between 18 to 60 years of age.
1. The applicant must not be a bank defaulter.
1. The applicant must not be a government servant.
1. The applicant must have experience in fisheries or aquaculture.
1. The applicant must have sufficient and suitable land for aquaculture activity.

**Eligibility Criteria for Self-Help Groups (SHGs)**

1. SHGs must be affiliated with APRSLM (Arunachal Pradesh State Rural Livelihood Mission).
1. SHGs under NERCOMP (for Changlang) are also eligible.
1. SHGs must be actively engaged in fisheries or aquaculture.

**Eligibility Criteria for Farmers Producer Organizations (FPOs)**

1. The FPO must be registered.
1. The FPO must have at least 100 shareholders.
1. The FPO must have at least one audited balance sheet.
1. Only FPOs engaged in fisheries/aquaculture are eligible.

scheme_name: Dr. A.N. Mukhopadhyay Gold Medal Award (B.Sc. Agriculture - Final Year Student)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a student.
 1. The applicant must be enrolled in the final year of the B.Sc. Agriculture course at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar.
 1. The award is granted for a duration of one year only.

scheme_name: Atma Nirbhar Pashu Palan Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
The following beneficiaries are eligible under this scheme:

 - Arunachal State Rural Livelihoods Mission (ArSRLM) promoted Self-Help Groups (SHGs), individuals, Farmers' Clubs, Registered Cooperative Societies, and Dairy Cooperative Societies (DCS) will be eligible.
 - Individuals should belong to the Arunachal Pradesh Scheduled Tribe (APST) category and be unemployed.

scheme_name: Atma Nirbhar Plantation Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
- The Scheme can be applied by individual farmers as well as Self-Help Groups (SHGs)/ Farmers Producer Organizations (FPOs).

**Eligibility Criteria for Individual Farmers**

1. The applicant should be a native of Arunachal Pradesh.
1. The applicant should be an individual farmer. 
1. The applicant should have landholding between 0.50 hectares and 25 hectares.
1. The applicant should not be a bank defaulter.
1. The applicant should not be a government servant.

**Eligibility Criteria for Self-Help Groups (SHGs)**

1. The applicant should be a Self-Help Group (SHG) based in Arunachal Pradesh. 
1. The SHG should have a minimum of 1.0 hectare and up to 50 hectares of land.
1. The SHG should not be a bank defaulter.
1. An already existing SHGs prior to involvement of SrLM shall be considered.
1. SHGs formed for small-scale industries such as weaving, knitting, tailoring, and other similar businesses shall not be entertained or considered eligible.

**Note:** The SHGs formed especially for Agri- sector shall be given priority.
**Eligibility Criteria for Farmers Producer Organizations (FPOs)**

1. The Farmer Producer Organization (FPO) should be registered in Arunachal Pradesh. 
1. The FPO should have a minimum of 5 hectares and a maximum of 50 hectares of land.
1. The FPO should have at least 100 shareholders.
1. The FPO should submit at least one audited Balance Sheet.
1. All board members and shareholders of FPO should be non-defaulters to any bank/financial institution.
1. All

scheme_name: Assistance to OBM Boat Owner Fishermen on Purchase of Kerosene/Petrol
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat.
1. The applicant must be a fisherman.
1. The applicant must be a Kerosene Card holder.
1. The applicant must own a small boat operated by an Outboard Motor (OBM).

scheme_name: Award of Opportunity Cost to Parents of Scheduled Caste Girl Students
eligibility_text_source:
1. The student should be a girl student studying in Class VI Standard to XII Standard of a Government or Government recognized educational institution in the Union Territory of Puducherry.
 1. The students should belong to the Scheduled Caste community.
 1. The girl student and her parent/guardian should be a native of the Union Territory of Puducherry either by virtue of birth or by continuous residence for a period of not less than 3 years.
 1. The annual income of the parents shall not be more than ₹24,000/-.

**Note:** The opportunity cost is payable to the parents only if girl students have been promoted to the next higher class.

scheme_name: Award of Fellowship to Most Eminent Artist
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be an artist.
 - The applicant must be 60 years or older.
 - The applicant should be retired from the professional field of plastic arts.
 - The applicant should have attained national-level fame and established a distinct identity through excellence in painting, sculpture, or graphic arts.

scheme_name: Ayush Oushadhi Gunvatta Evam Uttpadan Samvardhan Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
> **Component A (Pharmacies/Labs):**

 - The applicant should be a State Government ASU&H (Ayurveda, Siddha, Unani, and Homoeopathy) Pharmacy, Cooperative, or Public Sector Undertaking.
 - The applicant should be a private ASU&H manufacturing unit that is GMP compliant and has been functional for at least 3 years. 
 - The applicant should be a licensed Drug Testing Laboratory in the Government or Research Council sector. 
 - The applicant must have a functional ASU&H Pharmacy in their State/UT to be eligible for Drug Testing Laboratory funding. 

> **Component B (Pharmacovigilance):**

 - The applicant should be a National Institute, University, or Hospital under the Ministry of Ayush or State Government. 

> **Component C (Regulatory):**

 - The applicant should be a State Drug Regulatory Authority or State Licensing Authority. 
 - Component D (Standards):
 - The applicant should be a medical, scientific, or standards development institution in the Government or Private Sector.

scheme_name: Ayush Oushadhi Gunvatta evam Uttpadan Samvardhan Yojana (AOGUSY): Pharmacovigilance of ASU&H Drugs Including Surveillance of Misleading Advertisements
eligibility_text_source:
> **Eligible Organizations For Peripheral Pharmacovigilance Centres (PPvCs):**

- Ayush teaching hospitals recognized under NCISM/NCH Act, IMCC Act, HCC Act, or similar regulatory bodies.
- NABH accredited or Government ASU&H healthcare facilities and research council healthcare institutions.
- Institutions with technical competence and infrastructure for safety monitoring and reporting.
- Institutions with credible outcomes in similar projects are preferred.
- Institutions that previously received Central Government funding must have settled utilization certificates and no adverse remarks.

> **Eligible Organizations For Intermediary and National Centres:**

- Institutions designated by the Ministry of Ayush as National or Intermediary Pharmacovigilance Centres.

scheme_name: Ayush Oushadhi Gunvatta evam Uttpadan Samvardhan Yojana (AOGUSY): Strengthening of Central and State Regulatory Frameworks Including Technical Human Resource and Capacity Building Programs for Ayush Drugs
eligibility_text_source:
> **For Ayush vertical in CDSCO:**

- The Ayush vertical under the Central Drugs Standard Control Organization (CDSCO) is eligible for financial assistance under this component.

> **For State Ayush Directorate / State Drug Controller of Ayush drugs:**

- State Ayush Directorate / State Drug Controller of Ayush drugs are eligible.
- The state should have a functional Drug Testing Laboratory and a separate functional Enforcement Mechanism for ASU&H drugs.

> **Note:** Preference is given to States/UTs maintaining a database of manufacturing units and products, implementing dossier-based licensing, and conducting regular inspections as per the [Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940](https://www.indiacode.nic.in/bitstream/123456789/15278/1/drug_cosmeticsa1940-23.pdf) and Rules, 1945.

scheme_name: Ayush Oushadhi Gunvatta evam Uttpadan Samvardhan Yojana (AOGUSY): Support for Development of Standards and Accreditation/Certification of Ayush Products and Materials in Collaboration With BIS, QCI and Other Relevant Scientific Institutions and Industrial R&D Centres
eligibility_text_source:
> **Eligible Organisation:**

 - Organizations or institutes engaged in the development of standards for Ayush materials.
 - Medical, scientific, and standards development institutions, universities, or institutional departments in the government or the private sector.

> **Eligibility Criteria:**

 - Institutions must have adequate infrastructure and technical expertise to undertake standard development activities.

scheme_name: Ayush Oushadhi Gunvatta evam Uttpadan Samvardhan Yojana (AOGUSY): Strengthening and Up-Gradation of Ayush Pharmacies and Drug Testing Laboratories to Achieve Higher Standards
eligibility_text_source:
> **For State Government/Union Territory ASU&H Pharmacies/ State Government ASU&H Cooperatives/ State Government ASU&H Public Sector Undertakings (PSUs):** 

 - The pharmacy must be licensed under the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 and Rules, 1945 and should be GMP certified.
 - Government Pharmacies that received partial funding earlier will be considered for additional funds up to the prescribed cap.
 - Pharmacies that availed grants under previous schemes are eligible for additional funding, subject to full utilization of earlier grants and submission of work completion certificates with photographs.
 - Existing pharmacies must provide details of medicines manufactured during the last three years, including batch capacity and number of batches produced annually.
 - Applicant pharmacies must propose rational machinery, technology, and infrastructure upgrades aligned with existing facilities.
 - **Note:**

 1. Pharmacies without GMP certification can obtain certification through support under this scheme.
 1. Priority will be given to Government Pharmacies that did not receive funding under earlier schemes due to fund constraints or technical reasons.
 1. Application will be as per Format A1.

> **For State./U.T. Govt ASU&H Drug Testing Laboratories Government and Research Councils Laboratories:** 

 - The Drug Testing Laboratory must be licensed under the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 and Rules, 1945.
 - ASU&H Drug Testing Laboratories that availed grants under earlier s

scheme_name: Award of Puduvai Kalaimamani
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be an artist or author/writer.
1. The applicant's age should be 30 years or above. 
1. The applicant should be performed in the field of literature, music, dance, drama, painting and sculpture, and folk arts. 
1. The author/writer should have published books of high repute in poetry, prose, and research articles in literature and grammar in their respective languages. 
1. The applicant should participate in literary and research.
1. The applicant should not have been given any such award by other Government and Organisations like Universities etc.
1. The applicant should be a native of Puducherry or residence in Puducherry continuously for a period of 5 years.

scheme_name: Orunodoi 3.0
eligibility_text_source:
If any of the following criteria is observed in case of an applicant, it will be sufficient for inclusion under the scheme.
1. Widow, unmarried (above the age of 45 yrs)
2. Transgender
3. Person with disability, as defined in the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016, irrespective of gender
4. Old/Infirm woman including those residing in Government registered old age home
5. Women of the Household, where earning members are either disabled or aged (more than sixty years of age)
6. Woman in household, where any member is suffering from HIV/ Thalassemia/ Haemophilia/ Cerebral Palsy/ Leprosy/ Autism spectrum disorder
7. Woman in household without shelter
8. Destitute woman living on alms
9. Antyodaya Anna Yojana (AAY) woman beneficiary
10. Women in the household, composite income of which is less than Rs.2 lacs per annum.

scheme_name: Artisan Promotion
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be an Artisan.
- The applicant should be from one of the following target groups - Scheduled Castes, Other Backward Classes, Minority, Safai Karamchari, and Persons with Disabilities.
- The applicant should be a beneficiary of the Delhi Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, Other Backward Classes, Minorities, and Safai Karamchari Finance and Development Corporation (DSFDC).
- The applicant should have availed a loan from DSFDC.
- The applicant should be a resident of Delhi.
- The applicant should be registered online under Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSME) at the website www.udyogaadhar.gov.in.

scheme_name: Award of Pre-matric Scholarship to Scheduled Caste Students Studying from VI to X Standard in Government Schools and Government recognised Private Schools in the Union Territory of Puducherry
eligibility_text_source:
1. Boys and girls belonging to Scheduled Caste Community and studying from VI to X Standard are eligible to avail of the Scholarship.
 1. The student should be a native of the Union Territory of Puducherry by virtue of birth or having residence for a continuous period of not less than five years.
 1. The scholarship will be available only if the student is continuing his/her studies satisfactorily i.e. he/she secures promotion to the next higher class annually.
 1. The annual income of the parent/guardian shall not exceed ₹24,000/-.

**Note:** The annual income of the parents/guardians shall not exceed the limit of income for the below poverty line prescribed by the Government from time to time.

scheme_name: Assistance to Persons with Disabilities for Purchase/Fitting of Artificial Limbs/Appliances
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a native of Rajasthan.
1. The applicant should be a disabled person.
1. The applicant should be suffering from 40% disability.
1. The applicant’s family should not be an income tax payer.

scheme_name: Scheme to Provide Assistance to Processing Units in State Market Committees
eligibility_text_source: - All market committees in Gujarat are eligible to apply.

scheme_name: Aromatic Plants Cultivation - Centre for Aromatic Plants
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
 1. The applicant must be a farmer.
 1. The farmer must either legally own agricultural land or have leased land for a minimum period of 10 years.
 1. The farmer must be interested in aromatic plant cultivation.

scheme_name: Advance for Purchase or Construction of House (GBOCWWB)
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be a Worker registered with the Goa Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
- The worker should be between 18 to 60 years of age.
- The worker should have completed ninety days of service as a registered worker in the year.
- The applicant should have had membership in the Fund continuously for five years.
- The applicant should have fifteen years of service for superannuation.

scheme_name: Advance For Purchase Or Construction Of House (APB&OCWWB)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of Arunachal Pradesh.
2. The applicant must be employed in the Building and Other Construction works.
3. The applicant should be registered with Labour Welfare Board (APB&OCWWB).
4. The applicant should be an active registered worker with a membership for at least 5 years.
5. The applicant should have at least 15 years of service before superannuation/ retirement.
6. The applicant must be able to repay the principal amount of the loan with a minimum interest rate or with interest in equal installments as may be fixed by the board.

scheme_name: Awareness Programme on Child/Human Trafficking, Family Planning, Legal Awareness, Health etc.
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must be a Non-Governmental Organization.
- The applicant must have valid registration under Societies Act, XXI of 1860.

scheme_name: Assistance Program for the Cultivation of Lotus Fruit (Dragon Fruit)
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must be a farmer.
 - The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat.
 - The applicant must have a minimum land between 0.20 ha and 1 ha.
 - The applicant must procure quality planting materials from a nursery and start the plantation.

> **Note:** Preference will be given to small-scale and women farmers.

scheme_name: Assistance for Power Driven Chaff Cutter Scheme under Integrated Fodder Development Scheme (General Category)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The beneficiary should be a permanent resident of Gujarat.
 1. The beneficiary should belong to the General Caste category.
 1. The beneficiary should have a minimum of five (5) animals of his/her own.

scheme_name: Assistance for Power Driven Chaff Cutter Scheme under Scheduled Castes Sub Plan (SC Category)
eligibility_text_source:
- The beneficiary should be a permanent resident of Gujarat.
- The beneficiary should belong to the Scheduled Caste category.
- The beneficiary should have a minimum of five (5) animals of his/her own.

scheme_name: Assistance for Power Driven Chaff Cutter Scheme under Tribal Area Sub Plan (TASP- ST Category)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The beneficiary should be a permanent resident of Gujarat.
1. The beneficiary should belong to the Scheduled Tribe category.
1. The beneficiary should have a minimum of five (5) animals of his/her own.

scheme_name: Additional Pension to 100% Disabled Ex-Serviceman having No Child
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of Haryana.
 1. The applicant should be an Ex-serviceman. An ex-serviceman means a member of the Armed Forces who is released from service due to 100% disability or permanent incapacity to work and the disability or incapacity is attributable to service.
 1. The applicant should have 100% disability.
 1. The benefit is provided only to those Ex-Servicemen who have no children, irrespective of rank, until death.

scheme_name: Additional Pension to 100% Disabled Ex-Serviceman having Children
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of Haryana.
 1. The applicant should be an Ex-serviceman. An ex-serviceman means a member of the Armed Forces who is released from service due to 100% disability or permanent incapacity to work and the disability or incapacity is attributable to service.
 1. The applicant should have 100% disability.
 1. The benefit is provided for up to three children.
 1. The benefit continues until the child dies, attains the age of 20 years, gets married, or becomes employed, whichever is the earliest.

**Note 1:** Every eligible person shall give a certificate of eligibility on a half-yearly basis, in Form III and send it to the concerned Secretary of the District Sainik Board so as to reach him within the months of June and December every year.
**Note 2:** As and when one or more children of the eligible person die or reach the age of 20 years or get married or secure employment, it shall be the responsibility of the eligible person/guardian to inform the Secretary of the District Sainik Board in this regard.

scheme_name: Arun Pig Development Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of Arunachal Pradesh.
2. Pig-rearing individual farmers/ Self Help Groups (SHGs), ones identified by the District Pig Development Committee are eligible to apply under the scheme.
3. Preference would be given to women and genuinely poor farmers.

scheme_name: Assistance for Purchase of Educational Instruments for Medical, Engineering and Technical Diploma Courses
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat.
1. The applicant must belong to the Scheduled Tribe (ST) category.
1. The applicant must have passed the Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) examination.
1. The applicant must be enrolled in a recognized medical, engineering, or technical diploma course.
1. The applicant’s annual family income should not exceed ₹6,00,000/-.

scheme_name: Arunachal Pradesh Entrepreneurship Challenge
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a resident of Arunachal Pradesh above 18 years of age with principal business units or should have a proposal to set up branches in Arunachal Pradesh or an Arunachali currently working or residing outside the state, but wishes to return back to the state & become an Entrepreneur.
2. The applicant should be promised an idea and plan or prototype/working model.
3. The applicant should be an Entrepreneur with good communication skills.
4. The applicant should be an early-stage venture set up on or after 15 August 2015.
5. The applicant should be MSME-registered enterprises.
6. The applicant should be an existing entrepreneur in your district.
7. The applicant should be a College graduate.
8. The applicant should be Self-employed people in innovative businesses. 
9. The applicant should belong to organized producer groups.

scheme_name: Assistance Program for Expansion of Fruit Crop Cultivation
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a farmer.
 1. The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat.
 1. The applicant must be engaged in horticultural or fruit crop cultivation.

scheme_name: Assistance Program for Planting in Floriculture
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a farmer.
 1. The applicant must be engaged in floriculture farming (loose, cut, or tuberous flowers).

scheme_name: Assistance for Purchase of House (HBOCWWB)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be registered under the Haryana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
 1. The registered worker should have regular membership for at least 5 years and 8 years are left to attain the age of 60 years.
 1. The maximum age of the worker should be 52 years. So that he/she can repay the loan in the next 8 years.
 1. This facility will be available once in a lifetime.
 1. The application frequency is limited to once.

scheme_name: Admission Process in All Government and Non-Government Schools of the State
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
1. The applicant (child) must be 6 years old to get admission in Class 1.
1. The applicant (student) must be currently registered in Anganwadi Bal Vatika to be eligible for admission to Class 1.

scheme_name: APJ Abdul Kalam Scholarship
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a permanent resident of Kerala.
1. The applicant must be a regular/scheduled student.
1. The applicant should belong to a religious minority community (Muslim, Christian (all denominations), Sikh, Buddhist, Jain, Parsi).
1. The applicant must be studying a three-year diploma course in a government, aided, or government-approved self-financing polytechnic institution.
1. The applicant must have secured admission in a merit seat in a government-approved self-financing polytechnic institution.
1. The applicant's family annual income should not exceed ₹8,00,000/- if from the APL (Above Poverty Line) category.
1. The applicant can be a second-year or third-year student.
1. The applicant must have an account in their own name in any nationalised bank or scheduled bank.

> **Preference/Priority/Reservation/Relaxation:**

 - BPL (Below Poverty Line) category applicants will be given preference.
 - 30% of the scholarships are reserved for girls. If the specified percentage of girls is not met, eligible boys will also be considered for the scholarship.
 - The selection of minority students is based on family annual income and marks, proportionate to the population.

scheme_name: Assistance to Pilgrims for Kailash Mansarovar Yatra - Rajasthan
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a native of Rajasthan.
 1. The applicant should have successfully completed the Kailash Mansarovar Yatra through the Ministry of External Affairs, Government of India.
 1. The applicant receives this grant only once in a lifetime.

**Note 1:** 100 pilgrims are selected each year. If there are more applicants than available slots, selection is done through a lottery system.
**Note 2:** After completing the trip, a certificate from the Ministry of External Affairs confirming the successful completion of the journey is required.

scheme_name: Alpasankhyak Post-Maitrik Chhaatravrtti Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a native of the minority category of Madhya Pradesh.
1. The total annual income of the applicant's parents and guardian should not exceed ₹2,00,000/-.
1. Not less than 50 percent marks in the last qualifying examination.

scheme_name: Award of Pre-Matric Scholarship to Other Economically Backward Class (OEBC) Students
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be a citizen of India.
- The applicant should be a native of the Union Territory of Puducherry by birth or by continuous residence for not less than five years.
- The applicant should be studying from standard 6 to 10 and should have secured promotion to the next higher class.
- The applicant should belong to the Other Economically Backward Class (OEBC).
- The family income of the applicant should not exceed ₹75,000 per annum.

scheme_name: Award of Post-Matric Scholarship to Scheduled Caste Students
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be from a Scheduled Caste.
- The applicant should be a student studying at the Post-Matric level or Post Secondary Stage.
- The applicant should be a Native/Resident of the Union Territory of Puducherry for not less than 5 years.
- The annual income should not exceed ₹ 2,00,000/-.

scheme_name: Award of Pre-matric Scholarship to the Students Whose Parents Are Engaged in Unclean Occupation
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be from a Scheduled Caste.
- The applicant should be a Student.
- The applicant should be studying in Class 1st to Class 10th.
- The applicant should be a Native/Resident of the Union Territory of Puducherry.
- Either or both the parents of the applicant should be engaged in unclean occupation (Scavenger/ Flayer/ Tarner).

scheme_name: Assistance in Packing Materials under Post Harvest Management of Horticultural Produce
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a farmer.
 1. The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat.
 1. The applicant should be engaged in horticultural cultivation.

scheme_name: Assistance to Farmers in Purchasing Nano Fertilizers Under the Agricultural Assistance Program for Farmers Other than Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must be a farmer.

scheme_name: Assistance For Purchase Of Spectacles By A Differently Abled Person
eligibility_text_source: Differently-abled persons holding identity cards issued by the welfare board for the differently abled.

scheme_name: Assistance for Purchase of Spectacles - Folk Artists
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a registered folk artist.
1. The applicant should not have any dues payable to the board.
1. The applicant must not have availed similar benefits from any other government scheme.

scheme_name: Award of Puducherry State Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be a citizen of India.
- The applicant should be a native of the Union Territory of Puducherry by birth or by continuous residence for not less than five years.
- The applicant should be studying in 11th or 12th standard.
- The applicant should have secured promotion to the next higher class.
- The family income of the applicant should not exceed ₹75,000 per annum.
- If the applicant is studying in 11th standard, she/he should have secured 60% marks in 10th standard.
- If the applicant is studying in 12th standard, she/he should have secured 50% marks in 11th standard.

**NOTE:** _If proposals received more than the required number, the Directorate selects the required number of beneficiaries strictly in the order of merit of marks in per cent starting from the top and also in the order of preference of students from the Government schools, Government Aided schools and then from the Private schools recognized by the Government._

scheme_name: Assistance for Purchase of Traditional Musical Instruments and Costumes for Scheduled Caste/Tribe Individuals
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
1. The applicant must be a folk artist.
1. The applicant must belong to the Scheduled Caste or Scheduled Tribe community.
1. The applicant's monthly income must not exceed ₹2,000/-.
1. Only one set of musical instruments is provided per artist in a family under this scheme.

scheme_name: Interest Subvention Scheme For Housing Loan For Regular State Government Employee Under APUN GHAR
eligibility_text_source:
1. Permanent Employees of State Government of Assam with at least 5 years residual service will be eligible for the scheme once in his/her service tenure.
1. Minimum 21 years and at least 5 years residual service to be eligible for the loan and maximum of 70 years for employees with pensionable service and maximum of 60 year for non-Pensionable service 
1. The benefits of interest subvention will be available to the eligible employees who apply for housing loan within 2 (two) years from the date of issuance of the Government Office Memorandum/Notification
1. Employees not having salary account with SBI or having salary account for less than 1 Year should submit a ‘No Dues’ certificate from his existing/previous Banker.
1. However, an employee can avail more than ₹ 15 Lacs but the Assam Government Interest Subvention Scheme will be available on loan up to the prescribed limit under the scheme.
1. Close relatives can avail the Loan jointly if all are government employees of Assam. In such cases Assam Government Interest Subvention scheme will be available on loan clubbing together the prescribed limit under the scheme.
1. Those who already benefited under Apun Ghar scheme are not eligible.
1. Purchase of an ancestral plot of land from any close relative like Parents/Spouse/Siblings/Children is not covered by the scheme under any circumstances.

scheme_name: Assistance for Planting Vegetable Crops for Raw and Ripe Mandap
eligibility_text_source:

scheme_name: Anya Pichhda Varg Kalyan Chhatravaas
eligibility_text_source:

scheme_name: Additional Pension to Widow of Ex-Serviceman having Children
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be the widow of an ex-serviceman. A ‘widow’ means the widow of a member of the Armed Forces whose death has taken place while in service but not in any battle.
 1. The widow should be a resident of Haryana.
 1. The benefit is provided for up to three children of the widow.
 1. The benefit continues until the child dies, attains the age of 20 years, gets married, or becomes employed, whichever is the earliest.

**Note 1:** Every eligible widow shall give a certificate of eligibility on a half-yearly basis, in Form III and send it to the concerned Secretary of the District Sainik Board so as to reach them within the months of June and December every year.
**Note 2:** As and when one or more children of the eligible person die or reach the age of 20 years or get married or secure employment, it shall be responsibility of the eligible widow to inform the Secretary of the District Sainik Board in this regard.

scheme_name: Additional Pension to Widow of Ex-Serviceman having No Child
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be the widow of an ex-serviceman. A ‘widow’ means the widow of a member of the Armed Forces whose death has taken place while in service but not in any battle.
 1. The widow should be a resident of Haryana.
 1. The benefit is provided only to the widows of Ex-Servicemen who have no children, irrespective of the rank of ex-serviceman, until her death or remarriage.

scheme_name: Atal Pension Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
#### Age of joining and contribution period

1. The minimum age of joining APY is 18 years and maximum is 40 years.
1. The age of exit and start of pension is 60 years.
1. Subscriber contribution to APY shall be made through the facility of ‘auto-debit’ of the prescribed contribution amount from the savings bank account of the subscriber on monthly, quarterly or half-yearly basis.
1. The subscribers are required to contribute the prescribed contribution amount from the age of joining APY till the age of 60 years.

scheme_name: Annath Pension Yojana (JBOCWWB)
eligibility_text_source:

1. The applicant should be a child of the deceased.
1. The applicant should have been orphaned after the death of the pensioner.

1. The applicant should be an auto rickshaw owner or operator.
1. The applicant should possess a valid driving license suitable for operating an auto rickshaw.
1. The applicant’s auto rickshaw should not be more than 10 years old from the manufacturing year if petrol or diesel operated.

1. The applicant should comply with prescribed safety, speed, and tracking requirements.
1. The applicant may be a person with disability, provided all statutory driving and vehicle fitness conditions are fulfilled.
1. The applicant must not have any major traffic violations or criminal offences under motor vehicle laws in the previous year.

1. The vehicle must have the route number and auto-stand details clearly displayed on a visible white circular background with red letters.
1. The owner must ensure the vehicle carries all valid documents, including registration certificate, fitness certificate, insurance, permit, pollution control certificate, and motor vehicle tax receipt.
1. The owner must ensure the vehicle is not modified, including installation of music systems or unauthorized alterations; violation may result in permit cancellation.

scheme_name: Annapurna Scheme: Seed Multiplication Programme
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must belong to the Scheduled Caste (SC) or Scheduled Tribe (ST) category.
- The applicant must be a small or marginal farmer.

##### ***Criteria Specific to "Seed Production Programme"***

- The applicant must be willing to participate in the Seed Production Programme.
- The applicant's land must fall within the 10 km perimeter of the selected Government Agricultural Farms.
- The applicant must conduct the program in a minimum area of 1/2 acre (0.2 hectare).
- The maximum area for which subsidy is eligible is 1 hectare.
- The applicant must mandatorily register with the Seed Certification Agency.

##### ***Crops Included***

- Kharif crops - Paddy, Jowar, Bajra, Maize, Kodo, Kutki, Ragi.
- Rabi crops - Wheat, Barley.

##### ***Operational Area***
The program is implemented within the 10 kilometer perimeter of 46 specified Government Agricultural Farms. These farms are located across various districts, including Bhind, Gwalior, Datia, Shivpuri, Raipur, Rajnandgaon, Raigarh, Janjgir, Korba, Satna, Sidhi, Damoh, Chhatarpur, Panna, Seoni, Balaghat, Chhindwara, Narsinghpur, Katni, Umaria, Khargone, Dewas, Shajapur, Ratlam, Mandsaur, Bhopal, Sehore, Raisen, Betul, Rajgarh, Jagdalpur, Kanker, Sitapur, Koriya, Mandla, Shahdol, Dhar, and Jhabua.

scheme_name: Annapurna Scheme: Seed Production Programme
eligibility_text_source:

- The applicant must mandatorily register with the Seed Certification Agency.
- The plan includes the food grain crops Paddy (Dhan), Jowar, Bajra, Maize, Kodo, Kutki, Ragi (for Kharif), and Wheat (Gehu), Barley (Jau) (for Rabi).

****Preference should be given to the names listed first in the approved list.***
****The waiting list will remain valid only until the crop season.***

eligibility_text_source:

- The applicant should hold a minimum of 1.5 acres of land under the command area of the tubewell to be constructed and the applicant should have ownership of the land at least for 2 years and should have a clear ownership title deed in his/her name. The eligible land holding of 1.5 acres should be in favour of the applicant farmer or in favour of the spouse or favour of the member of a joint/undivided family.

scheme_name: Award Scheme for Candidates Selected in NDA, IMA, OTA, INA, IAF
eligibility_text_source:

scheme_name: Award to Scheduled Castes Students Who Secured Top Ranks at State and District Level in Standard X & XII (Sahuji Maharaj Assistance)

 1. There is no income limit.

scheme_name: Ashirwad
eligibility_text_source:
1. Girl should be 18 years old or above.
 1. Annual income of the family from all sources does not exceed ₹32,790/-.
 1. Parents/Guardians of the girl should be domiciled in Punjab State.
 1. The application can be given before the fixed date of marriage or after the 30 days of the marriage by the applicant for getting financial assistance.
 1. The amount of Ashirwad is limited up to two girls of the concerned family under the scheme.
 1. Financial assistance is given to Scheduled Castes/Christian girls, Backward Classes/Castes, Economically weaker sections girls, daughters of widows of any caste at the time of their marriage, and Scheduled Castes widows/divorcees at the time of their re-marriage.

scheme_name: Award of Scholarship to Differently Abled Person Students

- The disability of the applicant should be 40% and above.
- The assistance is extended to Student with Disabilities studying from 1st Standard upto Postgraduate/Professional courses.

scheme_name: Agricultural Skill Development Training Programme For Women Farmers And Farmers

scheme_name: Award Scheme to Encourage Entrepreneurs - Uttarakhand
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a registered artisan or weaver, or an industry registered as Handloom Weaver/Handicraftsman under the Directorate of Industries, Uttarakhand, or the Development Commissioner (Handicrafts/Handloom), Government of India.
 1. The applicant must be an individual artisan or weaver belonging to a registered handicraft or handloom cooperative society, or a registered non-governmental organization (NGO) within the state of Uttarakhand to be eligible for the award.
 1. The artisan’s/weaver’s cooperative society or institution must not be a loan defaulter with any department or bank.
 1. An artisan/weaver who has already received an award cannot apply again for the next three consecutive years.

scheme_name: Adivasi Sanskriti Evam Kala Kendra/Majhi Bhavan, Manki Munda Bhavan, Parha Bhavan, Pargana Bhavan, Dumkuria Bhavan Evam Gosade Nirman Tatha Majhi Than Shed Nirman Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should represent a village with a significant tribal population.

1. The applicant village must have government-approved land for the construction of the infrastructure.

scheme_name: Additional Subsidy to Establish Tourism Projects in Distant and New Ulterior Areas
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must establish a Tourism Project (e.g., Hotel, Resort, etc.) as defined in the Tourism Policy.
- The applicant must locate the project in an area classified as "distant" or "new ulterior" by the Government of Madhya Pradesh, Tourism Department.
- The applicant must meet a minimum investment limit of at least 50% of the prescribed limit mentioned in the standard Tourism Policy for that project category.
- The applicant must ensure the project meets at least 50% of the room capacity ceiling prescribed in the standard Tourism Policy.
- The applicant must ensure the project is established and operationalized during the operative tenure of the Tourism Policy.

scheme_name: Assistance Scheme For Construction Worker In Case Of General Or Accidental Death Or Injury
eligibility_text_source:
1. Applicant should be a Resident of Rajasthan State.
2. Construction workers in the age group of 18 to 60 years will be eligible for this scheme.
3. Applicant should be registered as Construction Worker under labor laws.
 No assistance shall be payable in the event of death or injury caused by suicide or by consumption of drugs or substances or in case of death or injury caused by assault on one another in contravention of law for the purpose of committing an offence.

scheme_name: Allotment of Shops in Kisan Bazaar
eligibility_text_source: 1. The applicant must be a resident of Uttarakhand.

scheme_name: Assistance Scheme For Reimbursement For Expenditure On Visa By Construction Workers For Employment Abroad
eligibility_text_source:
1. Applicant should be a resident of Rajasthan State.
 2.Applicant should be registered as Construction Worker under labor laws.

Other Conditions
 1. For getting contract employment abroad, it is necessary to take permission for migration from the office of Protectors of Emigrants (POE) under the Migrant Act, 1983.
 2. Registration of the recruiting agency under the Overseas Act or a valid permit from the POE office is necessary.
 3. Reimbursement of visa amount under the above scheme will be payable on the beneficiary passport having a minimum validity of 6 months including valid visa.
 4. Under the scheme, the benefit of assistance amount will be payable to the beneficiary only once.
 5. During scrutiny of application and documents, if any facts found to be false resulting in the cancellation of eligibility, it will be the responsibility of the concerned beneficiary to deposit all the assistance amount sanctioned under the scheme along with interest. 
 6. The benefit of this scheme will be payable only if the beneficiary is employed abroad, is in the building and other construction works.

> **Eligible Entities**

- Units must be registered under the Companies Act or as per MSME definitions.
- Units must have an acknowledgment of IEM (Industrial Entrepreneur Memorandum) or be registered with the respective State Directorate.
- Both existing and new units are eligible, subject to overall subsidy caps.
- If a unit has availed benefits under previous schemes like RRTUFS, only the remaining subsidy amount under ATUFS will be available.

> **Eligible Machinery**

- Only new benchmarked machinery from notified manufacturers or their authorized agents is eligible.
- A list of eligible machines is updated every year on April 1st by the Textile Commissioner.
- Second-hand machinery is not permitted.
- Accessories, attachments, and sample machines up to 20% of the machine cost are also eligible.
- Machines may be eligible for multiple segments unless restricted.
- Other essential machinery may be included later upon recommendation.
- UIDs (Unique Identification Numbers) are required for all eligible machines.
- Machinery must be purchased directly from authorized manufacturers or agents; certain cases of domestic purchases from authorized stockists may also qualify.
- The purchase date is determined by the commercial invoice date.
- Machine Identification Code (MIC) must be visibly inscribed on machines.

> **Eligibility for Assistance**

- Units must be registered and must be producing textiles as per the registered product line.
- Machinery must be verified during Join

scheme_name: Amma Two Wheeler Scheme for Working Women
eligibility_text_source:

1. Only woman and only one woman will be eligible to avail of the benefit in a family.
1. The applicant should have appeared for the class 8th examination (Passed/Failed).
1. Priority will be given to working women residing in remote places, hilly regions, women-headed households, deserted women, destitute widows, differently abled women, Unmarried women aged above 35 years, Scheduled Caste/Tribes, and Transgender.

> **Note** Saving clause: if the applicant has applied with a Learner License Registration(LLR) she should get a valid Two Wheeler Driving License before submitting the subsidy claim form. She should also attach a copy of the two Wheeler Driving License to the subsidy claim form, at the time of applying. Further, she should produce the original Driving License for official verification, as and when needed.

scheme_name: Assistance to Women for Trainer and Coaches Training Course

eligibility_text_source:

scheme_name: Acharya Vidyasagar Gau Samvardhan Yojana
eligibility_text_source:

- The applicant must have a valid Aadhaar card, and the cow must be registered with the Gau Samvardhan Board.

- The applicant must have a bank account in the name of the cow shelter or in their individual name.

scheme_name: Alpshankhyak Vikas Nidhi
eligibility_text_source:

eligibility_text_source:

- The applicant must agree to bear the balance of the estimated expenditure for the proposed project.

scheme_name: Assistance to Voluntary Organizations Working for Welfare of OBCs
eligibility_text_source:

1. The organization must be registered for at least three years (waivable in exceptional cases).
1. The organization should maintain a bank account in the organization’s name for at least three years.
1. The organization should not be run for profit by any individual or a body of individuals.

> **The following criteria would be kept in view while selecting the new VOs/NGOs:**

3. The applicant (Voluntary Organizati

scheme_name: Award of Merit Scholarship for Agricultural Engineering Students (B.Tech 3rd/4th Year)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a student.

 1. The scholarship is awarded for a duration of one year only.

scheme_name: Award Winning Tiatr Festival
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must be the director/producer of a tiatr that has won 1st, 2nd or 3rd place in any of the following competitions:
- The applicant must be the director/producer of a tiatr that won 1st, 2nd or 3rd prize in Tiatr Academy of Goa Popular Tiatr Competition.
- The applicant must be the director/producer of a tiatr that won 1st, 2nd or 3rd prize in Kala Academy Group 'A' tiatr Competition.
- The applicant must be the director/producer of a tiatr that won 1st, 2nd or 3rd prize in Kala Academy Group 'B' tiatr Competition.

***Post-Selection Conditions***

scheme_name: Anganwadi Workers Welfare Fund
eligibility_text_source:

scheme_name: Agnipath Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a citizen of India.
 1. For the 2022 intake, the age of the applicant should be between 17.5 to 23 years. For the subsequent intakes, the age of the applicant should be between 17.5 to 21 years.
 1. The applicant must fulfil the educational qualifications and physical and medical standards set by the Indian Army / Indian Navy / Indian Air Force.

> **Note 01:** The Agniveers will be enrolled in the Forces under respective Service Acts for a period of four years. They would form a distinct rank in the Armed Forces, different from any other existing ranks.

> **Note 02:** Upon the completion of four years of service, based on organizational requirements and policies promulgated by the Armed Forces from time to time, Agniveers will be offered an opportunity to apply for permanent enrolment in the Armed Forces.

> **Note 03:** The applications for permanent enrolment will be considered in a centralized manner based on objective criteria including performance during their four-year engagement period and up to 25% of each specific batch of Agniveers will be enrolled in the regular cadre of the Armed Forces. The selection will be the exclusive jurisdiction of the Armed Forces.

> **Note 04:** Agniveers will meet the medical eligibility conditions laid down for enrolment in the armed forces as applicable to respective categories/trades.

> **Note 05:** The educational qualification for Agniveers will remain as in vogue for enrollment in various categories.

scheme_name: AICTE - YOUTH UNDERTAKING VISIT FOR ACQUIRING KNOWLEDGE (YUVAK): STUDY TOUR OF ATAL TUNNEL, HIMACHAL PRADESH
eligibility_text_source:

scheme_name: Annapurna Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must be a woman.
 - The applicant must be aged between 25 to 60 years,

 - The applicant must not be paying any Income Tax.

> **Notes:**

- All the existing beneficiaries of the "Lakshmir Bhandar" Scheme shall be migrated to the "Annapurna Yojana" except dead, shifted, deleted, and absentee electors identified during SIR-2026, deletion in the 2™ list after publication of draft list, deleted after adjudication, ASDD found during voter slip distribution.
- Beneficiaries who have filed an appeal before the SIR Tribunal/applications under the Citizenship (Amendment) Act shall get financial assistance under the New Scheme till disposal of their applications. Likewise, names of dead and shifted beneficiaries will be deleted in the future on a regular basis.

scheme_name: Bal Ashrams

scheme_name: Birsa Awas Nirman Yojana
eligibility_text_source:

scheme_name: Border Areas Scholarship

scheme_name: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance to basic industrial infrastructure (Water, Gas and Approach Road)
eligibility_text_source:

 1. The approach road construction must be certified for quality by a government-approved third party.
 1. Expenditures on water/gas connections should be for connecting the industrial unit from the source.

> **Note****:** 

 - **SC/ST Enterprise:** SC/ST Enterprise means the enterprise in which contribution of SC/ST entrepreneur is 51% or more.

scheme_name: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance to GIDC for Developing Multi-Storied Shed in Estates
eligibility_text_source:

 1. The enterprise should be engaged in manufacturing or service activities (trading activities are not eligible).
 1. The business must commence production within the time limit fixed by GIDC.

> **Note****:** 

 - **SC/ST Enterprise:** SC/ST Enterprise means the enterprise in which contribution of SC/ST entrepreneur is 51% or more.

scheme_name: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance to Micro and Small Enterprises (MSE) of SC/ST for Plot Developed by GIDC
eligibility_text_source:

scheme_name: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance to MSME Manufacturing Sector Participation in the Exhibition (National and International)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The firm must be a Micro/Small/Medium enterprise run by SC/ST entrepreneur.

 1. International exhibitions must be approved by recognized bodies like the MSME Development Institute(MSME-DI), India Trade Promotion Organization(ITPO), EEPC India, Federation of Indian Export Organization(FIEO) etc. or state Government.

> **Note****:** 

 - **SC/ST Enterprise:** SC/ST Enterprise means the enterprise in which contribution of SC/ST entrepreneur is 51% or more.

scheme_name: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance for Power Connection Charges
eligibility_text_source:

 - A new power connection.
 - Additional load in case of business expansion.
 - Shifting of connection or service line to a different location.

> **Note:** 

 - **SC/ST Enterprise:** SC/ST Enterprise means the enterprise in which contribution of SC/ST entrepreneur is 51% or more.

scheme_name: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance for Quality Certification
eligibility_text_source:

scheme_name: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance in Rent to MSEs
eligibility_text_source:

scheme_name: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance for Technology Acquisition
eligibility_text_source:
1. The firm must be a Micro/Small/Medium enterprise run by SC/ST entrepreneur.
 1. New and existing enterprises engaged in manufacturing or process improvement.

 1. The MoU/Agreement/Contract must be signed within one year.
 1. The enterprise must obtain prior approval from the MSME Commissionerate.

> **Note:** 

 - **SC/ST Enterprise:** SC/ST Enterprise means the enterprise in which contribution of SC/ST entrepreneur is 51% or more.

scheme_name: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance of Capital Investment Subsidy
eligibility_text_source:
- The firm must be a Micro/Small/Medium enterprise run by SC/ST entrepreneur.
 - The enterprise must be a manufacturing enterprise.
 - Applications must be submitted online within one (1) year of the first loan disbursement date, the date of commercial production commencement, or the GR issue date, whichever is later, and before the scheme's last operative date.
 - The term loan should be sanctioned before the commencement of commercial production.
 - The enterprise must have started commercial production to avail of the subsidy.
 - If availing of a Central Government subsidy, the combined subsidy from the State and Central Governments should not exceed the total loan amount disbursed.

> **Note:** 

 - SC/ST Enterprise: SC/ST Enterprise means the enterprise in which contribution of SC/ST entrepreneur is 51% or more.

scheme_name: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance in Implementation of Information and Communication Technology (ICT)
eligibility_text_source:

1. The scheme is available to all eligible enterprises that plan to implement ICT solutions, such as hardware for cloud computing and networking.

> **Note:** 

 - **SC/ST Enterprise:** SC/ST Enterprise means the enterprise in which contribution of SC/ST entrepreneur is 51% or more.

scheme_name: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance for Interest Subsidy (Manufacturing Sector)
eligibility_text_source:
- The firm must be a Micro/Small/Medium enterprise run by SC/ST entrepreneur.

 - The enterprise must be engaged in the manufacturing sector.
 - The term loan should be availed from a recognized bank or financial institution.
 - The loan must be sanctioned before the enterprise starts commercial production.
 - If the enterprise installs a solar/renewable energy plant, it must be for captive consumption.
 - The enterprise must bear a minimum of 2% interest on the term loan.
 - The application must be submitted within the prescribed timeline.

> **Note:** 

 - **SC/ST Enterprise:** SC/ST Enterprise means the enterprise in which contribution of SC/ST entrepreneur is 51% or more.

scheme_name: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance for Interest Subsidy (Service Sector)

 - The loan should be sanctioned within one year before the commencement of commercial production.
 - Enterprises must have proper tax and business registrations.

> **Note:** 

SC/ST Enterprise: SC/ST Enterprise means the enterprise in which contribution of SC/ST entrepreneur is 51% or more.

scheme_name: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Assistance to MSEs for Shed Developed by Private Developer
eligibility_text_source:

eligibility_text_source:

scheme_name: Book Allowance to the Wards of Ex-Servicemen/Widows (Sainik Welfare)

scheme_name: Bed & Breakfast/Homestay Scheme- Punjab
eligibility_text_source:
**Breakfast/Homestay units will be categorized as follows:** **Gold Category & Silver Category**
> **Eligibility for Gold category:**

 1. The property should have at least 25% open area such as lawn/green area/outside terrace.
 1. Provision for hygienic storage of food should be there.
 1. Adequate parking space for the guests inside the premises should be there.

> **Eligibility for Silver Category:**

 - The properties which do not fulfill the criteria prescribed for the Gold category having at least one let-able room shall be eligible for registration under the Silver category.

> **Other General Conditions:**

 1. The owner of the property should have at least one let-able room and a maximum of six let-able rooms (12 beds).
 1. The registration for Bed & Breakfast / Homestay unit will be given only in those cases where the owner of the house is physically residing in the same property.
 1. In the case of BnB unit, the type of breakfast to be offered will have to be specified, the charges will be displayed and the visitors will be informed in advance to avoid any unnecessary dispute.

##### ***Selection Criteria (Post-Application)***

- The merit list shall be drawn up for each course from the marks secured at the Goa Board/Central Board Secondary School Certificate Examination (SSCE) Examination among eligible students.
- In case of two candidates having the same score for the National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) course, the score in the Science subject followed by the Mathematics subject

scheme_name: Book Bank Scheme: I

 1. The applicant should have the requisite fitness to undertake the journey and should not be suffering from any communicable disease.
 1. Under the scheme, an attendant can also accompany applicants above 70 years of age. The application of the attendant should be a joint application with the prospective 'Pilgrim'.
 1. The attendant has to pay 50% of the travel cost in the shape of a Bank Draft drawn on scheduled banks in favour of the Director, Tourism payable at Bhubaneswar along with the application.
 1. The attendant should be over 18 years of age.
 1. A married couple can apply 'jointly' for the pilgrimage trip. Their joint application will be treated as one application, but, the facilities provided will be individual. The joint application will be held eligible even if one of the spouses is less than 60 years of age.
 1. Under the scheme, the pilgrim can avail the benefit of a journey only once in a lifetime.
 1. Since the scheme is meant for poor and deprived sections of society, the applicant should mandatorily possess any of the following:

 - Antyodaya/ Annapurna card,
 - Ration Card under NFSA
 - Widow Pension/ Old Age Pension

eligibility_text_source:

First Semester Students:** Scholarship is determined by the marks/rank obtained in the PET (Pre-Engineering Test) examination conducted by the Chhattisgarh Professional Examination Board. - **For Polytechnic First Semester Students:** Scholarship is determined by the percentage of total marks obtained in the qualifying examination for admission. - **For Diploma Holders Admitted to B.E. through Lateral Entry:** Merit is determined by the percentage of marks obtained in the final year of the diploma. - **For Students in Higher Classes:** Scholarship is granted based on the merit list prepared from the marks of the previous passed semester examination. - **Post-Selection Conditions:** The scholarship is subject to satisfactory academic progress and regular attendance of the student.

Apart from this, if both the eyes become useless due to paralysis or the brain stops working, then it will also be considered as permanent disability.

eligibility_text_source:
