scheme_name: Incentive Scheme for Meritorious Students of Economically Backward Class of General Category
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a native of Rajasthan.
 1. The applicant should be a student.
 1. The applicant should belong to the economically backward class from the general category.
 1. The applicant should be studying in a government or private school.
 1. The applicant should have passed Class 10th, Praveshika, Class 12th (Science/Commerce/Arts), or Varishta Upadhyay examination conducted by Rajasthan Board of Secondary Education (RBSE), Ajmer. 1. The applicant should have secured a minimum of 75% marks in the qualifying examination.
 1. The applicant’s parents’ combined annual income from all sources should be less than ₹2,50,000.

scheme_name: Internship Scheme For PG/Research Students In Directorate General Of Trade Remedies (DGTR)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a Postgraduate Student or a Research Scholar from a recognized University/Institute.
1. The Internship should be a part of their Course curriculum (wherein duration of internship may extend to a semester) or undertaken as an additional assignment during the annual vacations.

scheme_name: Interest Subsidy Reimbursement Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
All the Start-ups certified by the Start-up Promotion Cell (SPC) having a valid start-up certificate number are eligible to apply for this scheme.
**NOTE:** Only expenditures incurred after notification of Goa Start-up Policy 2017 within the validity of this policy and paid for digitally would be considered for reimbursements under this scheme. In case digital payments are not possible then it shall be up to the decision of SPC as per its due diligence to admit the expenditure.

scheme_name: Interest Subvention Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. Enterprises promoted by all categories of borrowers, proprietary concerns, partnership firms, companies & other legal entities.
 1. The scheme is extended for all new investments in building, plant and machinery directly involved in production by new enterprises and existing enterprises by way of expansion, diversification, modernization and technology up-gradation etc., considering the gross block of plant and machineries.
 1. Purchase of land from KIADB / KSSIDC or any other govt. agencies is not available under this scheme.
 1. The unit which has already availed the interest subsidy under any other scheme of Government of Karnataka / Government of India are also not eligible for interest subsidy under this scheme.
 1. The enterprise will be eligible for 5.5% p.a. interest subvention for a maximum period of five years from the date of first disbursement of respective loans even if the repayment period exceeds beyond five years.

**Activities covered under this scheme:** 

 - Agro & Food Processing, Textile, Ready-made Garments, Engineering, Automobiles, Electrical & Electronics, Paper & Paper Products, Printing & Publishing, Telecommunications, Software & IT related and Wood based activities.

**Terms and Conditions:**

 - The terms and conditions of loan sanction such as promoters contribution, DER, Security requirement, viability of the project etc., shall be ensured as per the prevailing lending policy of the Corporation.

scheme_name: Interest Subsidy Scheme for Smaller Business Units
eligibility_text_source:
1. All the new and existing units must have their operations in Goa.
2. The applicant must be one of the below:

- Proprietorship Firm
- Private Limited Company incorporated under the Companies Act, 2013 (or equivalent)
- Public Limited Company incorporated under the Companies Act, 2013 (or equivalent)
- Registered Partnership Firm incorporated under the Indian Partnership Act, 1932 (or equivalent)
- Limited Liability Partnership incorporated under the Limited Liability Partnership Act, 2008 (or equivalent)

3. The bank accounts of the unit and/or its partner(s)/director(s) should be linked to Aadhaar.

scheme_name: Interest Subsidy Scheme, 2008
eligibility_text_source:
- Only new Micro and Small Enterprises which went into commercial production after the commencement of this Scheme were eligible to avail facilities under this Scheme.
- Only those units permanently registered with Entrepreneur Memorandum II by the Directorate of Industries, Trade and Commerce were eligible under this Scheme.
- Units were eligible for the benefit for the period of 5 years (20 quarters) subsequent to the quarter in which the commercial production had commenced.
- This Scheme was applicable to industries covered under the “Green” list and specified “Orange” List (The units covered under Orange II, II B were not entitled to avail benefit under this Scheme).
- This Scheme was not applicable to units under revival plan as defined under sick unit revival policy.
- The Scheme was applicable to the units which had availed loan as term loan and working capital from nationalized banks or scheduled bank or Co-operative Bank or Economic Development Corporation Ltd. or any other Financial Institution notified by the Government of Goa.

scheme_name: Interest Subsidy Scheme, 2017
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must represent one of the following - 

 (a) A Micro, Small and Medium manufacturing industry.
 (b) A project of Hinterland Eco tourism in lesser developed talukas registered with/recognized by the Department of Tourism/Goa Investment Promotion Board/Town & Country Planning/Planning & Development Authority/Eco Sensitive Zone Authority.

- The industry must be listed under White category, Green category and Orange category.
- The industry must have commenced production after 01-10-2017.
- The industry must engage a minimum of 60% of Goan manpower on regular employment.
- The industry must have availed loan as term loan and/or working capital loan for conducting business of the unit claiming the benefit.
- The loan must be availed from any nationalized bank, scheduled private bank, Co-operative Bank, Economic Development Corporation Limited, or any Non-Banking Financial Institutions recognized by the Reserve Bank of India.

scheme_name: Internship Scheme For Students Of Counselling/ Psychology/ Social Work/ Home Science Etc
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should have passed out from any of the recognised universities with a Master's Degree.
1. The Master's Degree should have been in Social Service/ Social Work/ Sociology/ Psychology/ Home Science/ Post Graduate Diploma in Counselling etc.
1. The applicant should have passed out as a post-graduate within three years prior to applying for the internship.
1. The applicant should have obtained at least 50% marks in aggregate in the final year of the postgraduation.

scheme_name: Incentive To Saharia Students For B.Ed
eligibility_text_source:
1. The student should be a native of Rajasthan.
1. The student should belong to Saharia class, a tribe of the Baran district of Rajasthan.
1. The student should be a regular trainee in the government / non-government BEd training institute.
1. The student's mother/father/guardian/guardian should not be a taxpayer.
1. The student who is studying while living in the hostel is run by the government. They will not be entitled to benefit under the said scheme.
1. Students should have a Vaidya Bhamashah card and Aadhaar.

scheme_name: Industrial Sector Scheme (HSFDC)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a resident of Haryana.
 1. The applicant should belong to the Scheduled Caste Category.
 1. The applicant should belong to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) family.
 1. The applicant's annual family income should not exceed ₹1,80,000/- in both rural and urban areas.
 1. The applicant's annual family income should not exceed the BPL limit.
 1. The applicant's name should be included in the BPL Survey List.

**Note:** The eligibility of the applicant is verified by the field staff before sponsoring the same to the bank for sanction.

scheme_name: Integrated Scholarship Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a native of Madhya Pradesh.
2. The applicant should be studying in a government/aided private college.
3. The annual income of parents/guardians of the applicant should not exceed ₹54,000/-.
4. The other qualifications of the applicant:

 - **Ph.D:** 55% marks in post-graduation. - **Postgraduate:** 55% marks in graduation. - **Graduation (qualification cum means):** 55% marks in the examination of the Board of Secondary Education. - 60% marks in Graduation (qualifying) examination of Board of Secondary Education.
 - **Sports:** The applicant should be a member of the national sports team in the school team of Madhya Pradesh, or should be a member of the adult team of the state or should have been in any of the first three places in the state level competition.

scheme_name: Interest Subsidy Scheme on Education Loan
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat.
 1. The applicant must be a student.
 1. The applicant must have passed HSC (Higher Secondary Certificate) with at least 60 percentile.
 1. The applicant must have taken an education loan from a recognized bank for pursuing higher education in India or abroad.
 1. The applicant must have a family income not exceeding ₹6,00,000/- per year.

scheme_name: Integrated Social Security Scheme - Old Age Pension
eligibility_text_source:
1. The age of the applicant should be at least 60 Years for Men and at least 55 Years for Women.
1. The income of the applicant should be less than ₹ 75,000/- per annum or the applicant should be from the "Below Poverty Line (BPL)" Category.

scheme_name: Integrated Social Security Scheme - Pension For Transgender
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be Transgender.
1. The income of the applicant should be less than Rs. 75,000/- per annum or the applicant should be from the "Below Poverty Line (BPL)" Category.

scheme_name: Integrated Social Security Scheme - Pension For Physically Challenged Persons
eligibility_text_source:
1. The age of applicant should be between 18 and 79 years.
1. The applicant should have severe or multiple disabilities with a disability percentage of at least 40%.
1. The income of the applicant should be less than ₹ 75,000/- per annum or the applicant should be from the "Below Poverty Line (BPL)" Category.

scheme_name: Integrated Social Security Scheme - Women In Distress
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a destitute widow/divorced/deserted woman.
1. The income of the applicant should be less than ₹ 75,000/- per annum or the applicant should be from the "Below Poverty Line (BPL)" Category.
1. The age of the applicant should be between 40 and 79 years.

scheme_name: Interest Subsidy Scheme for Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe Entrepreneurs
eligibility_text_source:
1. The unit shall be fully owned by SC / ST entrepreneurs i.e., all promoters in proprietary / partnership / company shall belong to SC/ST community only.
 1. The ownership / share holdings of units even in part by other than SC/STs are not eligible for interest subsidy.
 1. Entrepreneurs either can be SCs / STs or both.

**Others terms & conditions:**

 1. The units which have availed the interest subsidy under any other scheme of Government of Karnataka/Government of India are not eligible for interest subsidy under this scheme.
 1. To be eligible for interest concession under the scheme, the units should not be in default in repayment to KSFC.
 1. KSFC is at liberty to consider any amount of project cost. However, the interest subsidy is restricted to ₹1,000.00 lakhs of the loan. Interest amount on the balance loan amount beyond ₹1,000.00 lakhs is required to be borne by the entrepreneurs.
 1. KSFC may sanction loans with normal applicable rate of interest, the effective interest rate to be paid by the beneficiary / borrower will be 4%. The difference between the normal lending rate of KSFC and effective interest rate of 4% will be reimbursed by Government of Karnataka.

scheme_name: Integrated Social Security Scheme: Old Age Pension
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of the Union Territory of Ladakh.
 1. The applicant should belong to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) Category.
 1. The applicant’s age should be 60 years and above for males and 55 years and above for females.
 1. The applicant should have no means of subsistence from their own source of income or through financial support from family members or other sources.

scheme_name: Integrated Social Security Scheme: Pension to Physically Challenged Persons
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of the Union Territory of Ladakh.
 1. The applicant should be a physically challenged person with a disability of 40% or more (including Blind, Deaf, Dumb).
 1. The applicant should belong to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) category.
 1. The applicant's age should be between 18 and 79 years.
 1. The applicant should have no source of income.

scheme_name: Integrated Social Security Scheme: Pension for Women in Distress
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of the Union Territory of Ladakh.
 1. The applicant should be a distressed woman, such as a destitute, separated, divorced, or widow.
 1. The applicant should belong to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) category.
 1. The applicant's age should be between 40 and 79 years.
 1. The applicant should have no source of income.

scheme_name: Internship Scheme By The Unique Identification Authority Of India (UIDAI)
eligibility_text_source:
> **For Internship** 

1. The applicant should be a citizen of India.
2. The applicant should be a bonafide student of any recognized University/ Institution within India or abroad.
3. The applicant should fulfil ANY ONE of the following conditions:
 A) The applicant should be studying in the 3rd / 4th year (Final or pre-final) in B.Tech / BE course of any discipline and secured a minimum of 60% marks (GPA avg of 6.0) in all prior semester examinations. 
 B) The applicant should be a graduate student having completed/ appeared in the term-end exams of the 1st year/2nd semester of their post-graduate programme or pursuing research/ PhD and secured not less than 60% or equivalent marks in Graduation. 
 C) The students who have appeared in the final exam or just completed Graduation/PG and waiting for admission to higher studies or job may also be considered for internship provided that they fulfil the following conditions - 
 C1) They have secured 60 % or more cumulative marks in all the years/semesters of their graduation/ post-graduation till the date of application. 
 C2) The period between the month of declaration of the result of the final exam and the desired month of the internship should not exceed six months.

> **For Fellowship**

1. The student must be registered for a PhD at an Indian institution. 
2. These fellowships are for six to nine months (extendable to 12 months) on Computer Science (Including, but Not Limited to It Act and Cyber Laws Related to Data Privacy

scheme_name: "Interest Subvention on Working Capital" under the "Assam Tea Industries Special Incentives Scheme"
eligibility_text_source:
**General Eligibility**

- The applicant must be a tea plantation across all sizes
- The applicant must be a tea manufacturing unit manufacturing Crush, Tear, Curl Tea, Orthodox Tea, or Speciality tea including Green tea, Oolong Tea, White tea, Yellow tea and Purple tea
- The applicant must be located entirely in Assam
- The applicant must not have any part of the plantation or manufacturing facility located outside the State of Assam

**Interest Subvention Specific Eligibility**

- The applicant must have taken loan from a Scheduled Commercial Bank or a Public Financial Institution.
- The applicant must have taken Working Capital Loan for activities directly related to plantation or manufacturing of Tea.
- The applicant must have Working Capital sanctioned or renewed on or after 1st April of the financial year in which claim is to be made (2023-24, 2024-25, 2025-26, 2026-27 and 2027-28).
- The applicant must not have loan accounts declared as Non-Performing Asset as per Reserve Bank of India guidelines on the date of filing claim.
- The applicant must not have availed any interest subsidy under any other scheme.

scheme_name: Integrated Technology Enabled Agriculture Management System Or iTEAMS
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a resident of Meghalaya.
1. The applicant should be a bonafide farmer engaged in agriculture.

scheme_name: Integrated Toll Free 104 Helpline
eligibility_text_source: 1. The general public of Uttarakhand is eligible to avail the benefits.

scheme_name: Incentive To Girls
eligibility_text_source:
1. The student should be a native of Rajasthan.
1. Schools, Colleges, and Universities are recognized by the state and state government.
1. Girl Students should not have failed in the last year. 
1. The incentive amount is not payable to the girl students who leave school, college, or university in the middle of the class session.

scheme_name: IT Incubation Centre - Information Technology Development Agency
eligibility_text_source: 1. Startups registered in Uttarakhand, along with IT and medical students (especially those involved in Skill Development, IT & AI, Travel & Tourism, Healthcare, Technology, and Bio-Robotics), are eligible to avail the benefits offered by the Incubation Centre.

scheme_name: Indirect Tax Internship Scheme In Central Board Of Indirect Taxes And Customs (CBIC)
eligibility_text_source:
1. Law students who are pursuing a 3-year LLB course/5-year integrated LLB course.
1. Law graduates who have completed a 3-year LLB course/5-year integrated LLB course for not more than two years.
1. Students who have appeared in the final year/ semester examination on the cutoff date.

> **Reservation / Preference / Priority**

Preference shall be given to students/graduates of reputed institutions.

scheme_name: IT Policy and Amendments-2020 - Information Technology Development Agency
eligibility_text_source: 1. IT, ITES, Internet Service Providers, Telecom Service Providers, IT-based industries, investors, startups, and youth from Uttarakhand are eligible to avail of the benefits offered under the policy.

scheme_name: "Innovation in Technology [Product (or) Process]" under “Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries - State Awards to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises”
eligibility_text_source:
- The unit shall have obtained a patent/applied for a patent for the innovation.
- The unit shall be functioning profitably for 3 years before the date of application.
- The unit should provide at least 60% of employment to the people of UT of Puducherry of the total employment strength of the industrial units.

scheme_name: Scheme of Cash Incentive to Medal Winners in International Sports Events and their Coaches
eligibility_text_source: The cash incentive shall be awarded exclusively for the sports disciplines specified.

scheme_name: Incentives to Students who Passed the Civil Service Examination
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a native of Madhya Pradesh.
1. The applicant should belong to the Scheduled Tribe category.
1. The applicant should be successful in Civil Services exams (Preliminary, Main, Interview) conducted by MPPSC or UPSC.
1. The applicant is eligible for incentives only for the first success at each stage.
1. The applicant should is eligible to receive 50% of the incentive amount in case of second success.
1. The applicant will be ineligible for benefits after the third success.

scheme_name: IT Saksham Yuva Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. Applicant should be a domicile of Haryana having a valid Parivar Pehchan Patra ID.
1. Applicant’s age should be between 18 to 35 years. 
1. Applicants should not be in any kind of employment e.g., public/government/private sector/ quasi-government or self-employment at the time of applying for the scheme.
1. Applicants should be graduate or post-graduate (B. Tech./ BCA/ BSc. IT) / (M.E./M. Tech./MCA/MSc IT/MBA IT) from recognized institutes/ colleges/ universities. 
1. The candidates will be eligible for unemployment allowance only if the annual family income of the candidate does not exceed rupees three lakhs (₹ 3 lakhs) from all sources.
1. The unemployment allowance will only be commenced post 1 month from the Date of issuance of the passing certificate for the assessment test of the course completed.

scheme_name: IELTS & TOEFL Training Assistance
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must belong to the Scheduled Tribe (ST) category.
1. The applicant must be a student and must have passed class 12th (HSC).1. The applicant should be residing in a notified tribal area of Gujarat.
1. The applicant must intend to pursue higher education abroad.
1. The applicant must require IELTS or TOEFL training as part of their admission preparation.

scheme_name: “Ishan Uday” Special Scholarship Scheme For North Eastern Region
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a domicile of NER.

scheme_name: IVRI Institute Scholarship For M.V.Sc. And Ph.D.
eligibility_text_source:
**IVRI Institute Scholarship for M.V.Sc. and Ph.D.**

- The applicant must be admitted to the M.V.Sc. or Ph.D. programme through a competitive entrance examination conducted by the Indian Veterinary Research Institute.
- Candidates must maintain a minimum CGPA of 7.00 out of 10.00 at the end of each semester to continue receiving the scholarship.

**For Master’s (M.V.Sc.) Programme**

- The applicant must possess a Bachelor’s Degree in Veterinary Science in the relevant discipline as specified by the Veterinary Council of India.
- Candidates must have secured at least 60% aggregate marks or equivalent CGPA.
- A minimum of 55% marks is required for SC/ST and sponsored candidates.

**For Doctoral (Ph.D.) Programme**

- The applicant must possess an M.V.Sc. degree in the relevant discipline from a recognized university in India.
- General/OBC candidates must have a minimum CGPA of:

6.50 out of 10.00 scale, or
3.25 out of 5.00 scale, or
2.60 out of 4.00 scale.

- SC/ST/Physically Challenged/Sponsored candidates must have a minimum CGPA of:

5.50 out of 10.00 scale, or
2.75 out of 5.00 scale, or
2.20 out of 4.00 scale.

- Where only marks are awarded, General/OBC candidates must have at least 60% marks, while SC/ST/Physically Challenged/Sponsored candidates must have at least 50% marks.

**Age Limit**

- The minimum age for Ph.D. candidates is 23 years as on 1st August of the academic session.
- There is no upper age limit.

scheme_name: Jharkhand Rajya Patrakar Swasth Bima Yojna Niyamawali 2021
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must reside in Jharkhand and their work area should be within the state.
1. The applicant should be an accredited journalist in Jharkhand.
1. The media representatives must be from newspapers, magazines, news agencies, electronic media, or news-based electronic media.
1. The applicant must be regularly or contractually employed by the respective media organization.
1. The applicant must possess an accreditation certificate issued by the state government.
1. The journalist's age should be between 21 to 60 years. 
1. Freelance journalists must present valid press credentials issued by the Information and Public Relations Department at the time of applying.
1. The insurance coverage will include the media representative's spouse and two unmarried and dependent children up to the age of 21 years.

scheme_name: Jeevanam Self-Employment Scheme To Dependents Of Crime Victims
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a native and resident of Kerala State.
 1. The applicant must be either the person who has been seriously injured in a crime or must be a dependent - Wife/Husband/Unmarried son or daughter of the victim of the crime.
 1. The annual income of the family should not exceed ₹1,00,000/-.
 1. The applicant should have applied within 5 years of the crime.

**Note:** The beneficiary selected for the grant–in–aid is required to execute an agreement with the Department of social justice on a stamp paper of ₹200/- to meet the above criteria.

scheme_name: Jharkhand State Backward Classes Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
**Eligibility Criteria for the Student:**

1. The student should be a native of Jharkhand.
1. The student belongs to the Other Backward Class category.
1. The student's family annual income should not exceed ₹2,50,000/-.
1. The student must be enrolled in a recognized educational institution that complies with the rules of the scheme and is registered on the departmental scholarship portal. The student should be pursuing a post-matric course (Degree, Diploma, Certificate, or equivalent). 
1. The student should not be receiving any other scholarship or financial assistance from the central or state government. 

**Classification of Courses:****** [**Page No. 18**](https://ekalyan.cgg.gov.in/downloads/Post_Matric_Scholarship_sankalp_2022.pdf)
Group 1: Professional degree/postgraduate courses in institutions with A++ to B++ NAAC accreditation.
Group 2: Vocational and diploma courses requiring Class 12 or higher qualifications.
Group 3: Polytechnic and other courses not covered in Groups 1 or 2.
Group 4: Graduate and Post Graduate course.Group 5: All post-matriculation (Post Class X level non-degree courses).

scheme_name: Jharkhand State Backward Classes Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant/parents/guardians should be a native of Jharkhand.
1. The applicant should be a student.
1. The applicant must belong to the Other Backward Class category.
1. The applicant must be enrolled in a state government-recognized school.
1. There is no income limit for students from Class 1st to 8th.1. The applicant's annual family income should not exceed ₹2,50,000/- for Class 9th and 10th.

scheme_name: Jan Samuh Bima Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be native Rajasthan.
 1. The applicant should be a family member or dependent of the deceased person. 
 1. The deceased person should belong to the Sahariya community.
 1. The deceased person should be a resident of the Baran district, Rajasthan.
 1. The insured person must be registered under the scheme before death.

scheme_name: Jharkhand State Scheduled Caste Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
**Eligibility Criteria for the Student:**

1. The student should be a native of Jharkhand.
1. The student belongs to the scheduled caste category.
1. The student's family annual income should not exceed ₹2,50,000/-.
1. The student must be enrolled in a recognized educational institution that complies with the rules of the scheme and is registered on the departmental scholarship portal. 
1. The student should be pursuing a post-matric course (Degree, Diploma, Certificate, or equivalent). 
1. The student should not be receiving any other scholarship or financial assistance from the central or state government.

1. Group 1: Professional degree/postgraduate courses in institutions with A++ to B++ NAAC accreditation.

1. Group 3: Polytechnic and other courses not covered in Groups 1 or 2.
1. Group 4: Graduate and Post Graduate course.
1. Group 5: All post-matriculation (Post Class X level non-degree courses).

scheme_name: Jharkhand Sports Excellence Cash Award Scheme to Players
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a sportsperson.
1. The Athletes must represent Jharkhand in competitions recognized by national/international Olympic committees.
1. The Athletes must have secured a medal or participated in such competitions.
1. The record-setting athletes are eligible for additional cash incentives.
1. Awards for one competition are based on the highest achievement if multiple medals are won.

scheme_name: Jharkhand State Food Security Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a resident of Jharkhand.
1. The applicant must possess a Green Card issued under JSFSS.

scheme_name: Junior/Senior Fellowship in the Field of Fine Arts
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be a resident artist of Gujarat.
 - The applicant should be actively engaged in the field of painting, sculpture, or graphic arts.

scheme_name: Jharkhand State Migrant Labourers Survey and Rehabilitation Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The migrant worker must be a resident of Jharkhand.
1. The worker must be between the ages of 18 and 65 years.
1. The death or injury must have occurred due to an accident while working outside the state.
1. The worker must be engaged in an unskilled or semi-skilled job.
1. The worker should belong to economically weaker sections (EWS).

scheme_name: Jharkhand Sportsperson Pension Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a resident of Jharkhand.
1. The applicant should be a sportsperson or dependent on the deceased sportsperson.
1. The applicant must receive the Arjuna, Dronacharya, or Dhyan Chand awards, an Olympic participant, or a medalist in Commonwealth or Asian Games.
1. The applicant should be retired from active sports.
1. The applicant must be at least 40 years old (age relaxation up to 10 years for medically retired athletes).
1. The applicant must not be employed in any government, PSU, or pension scheme.
1. The applicant should have no criminal convictions.
1. The applicant should not be receiving any pension from the Government of India or any other state government.

scheme_name: Jharkhand State Scheduled Caste Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
