scheme_name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
eligibility_text_source:
> **For Institutional Delivery (General):**

- The applicant must deliver in a government health centre, such as a Sub-centre (specifically approved for institutional delivery by the state), Primary Health Centre, Community Health Centre, First Referral Unit, or the general wards of District and State Hospitals.
- The applicant may deliver in an accredited private health institution.

> **Eligibility Specific to Low Performing States (LPS):**

- The applicant must be a pregnant woman.
- The applicant does not need any marriage or Below Poverty Line (BPL) certification if delivering in a Government or accredited private health institution.
- For Above Poverty Line (APL) women in LPS: The applicant is extended benefits if availing institutional delivery care in government health centres (Sub-centre, Primary Health Centre, Community Health Centre, First Referral Unit, and general wards of District and State Hospitals).

> **Eligibility Specific to High Performing States (HPS):**

- The applicant must be from a Below Poverty Line (BPL) household.
- The applicant must be a Scheduled Caste (SC)/Scheduled Tribe (ST) woman.

> **For Accredited Private Institutions (LPS & HPS):**

The applicant must be from a Below Poverty Line (BPL) household.

- The applicant must be a Scheduled Caste (SC)/Scheduled Tribe (ST) woman.
- The applicant must produce a proper Below Poverty Line or a Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe certificate.
- The applicant should carry a referral slip from the Accredi

scheme_name: Janani Sahayogi Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a resident of Madhya Pradesh.
1. The applicant must be a pregnant woman. 
1. The applicant must belong to a Below Poverty Line (BPL) family.
1. The applicant must present a valid BPL Health Card such as Blue, Yellow, or Antyodaya Card.

scheme_name: Kerala Biotechnology Re-Entry Fellowship
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should possess a Ph.D., M.D., or equivalent degree and at least three years of post-doctoral research experience in premier research laboratories abroad with an outstanding track record of research in biotechnology-related areas as reflected in publications and other recognitions.
 1. Only candidates (Indian nationals) working overseas who are below 45 years of age are eligible; relaxable for 3 years for OBC and 5 years for SC/ST/PH candidates.
 1. The fellowship is tenable at any reputed institution in Kerala.

scheme_name: KULAVILAKKU
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be a citizen of India.

- The applicant should be a native of the Union Territory of Pondicherry by birth or by continuous residence of not less than 5 years.

- The applicant should be a woman.
- The applicant should be pregnant.
- The applicant should have attained the age of 18 years.
- The applicant should have crossed seven months of pregnancy.
- The annual income of the applicant should not exceed ₹24,000/- per annum.
- The benefit will be provided for upto two pregnancies only.

scheme_name: Accident Assistance (K.B.O.C.W.W.B)
eligibility_text_source:
> ***For Registration as a Building/ Construction Worker:***

 - The applicant should be a Building/ Construction Worker (Unorganised Worker).
 - The applicant should be a minimum of 18 years of age.
 - The applicant should have engaged in building and construction work for at least 90 days in a given year.

> **For the Application of the Welfare Scheme:**

 - The applicant should be a registered construction worker Under the Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board of Karnataka.
 - The accident must occur either during the course of employment or outside of work.

scheme_name: Kabir Anthyesthi Anudan Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a resident of Bihar.
 1. The applicant should be a family member or dependent of the deceased person.
 1. The deceased should belong to a Below Poverty Line (BPL) family.

**Note:** The grant is provided to cover funeral expenses for the death of any person of any age from a BPL family.

scheme_name: Krushak Assistance For Livelihood And Income Augmentation
eligibility_text_source:
1. Residency: The applicant must be a permanent resident of Odisha.
1. Agricultural activities: The applicant must be engaged in agricultural activities, such as farming, cultivation, horticulture, or animal husbandry, either as a landowner, tenant farmer or sharecropper.
1. Household status: The applicant's household should be categorized as "deprived" or "vulnerable" under the Socio-Economic Caste Census (SECC) 2011 or any other state government survey.
1. Landownership: The applicant must either own cultivable land or be a sharecropper/tenant farmer cultivating someone else's land.
1. Age: There is no age limit for applying for the KALIA Scheme.
1. Income: The applicant's annual income should be less than Rs. 2.00 lakhs per annum.
1. Bank account: The applicant must have a bank account in his/her name and a valid Aadhaar number linked to the account.
1. Criminal record: The applicant must not have any criminal record or involvement in any illegal activities.

scheme_name: KALIA Scholarship
eligibility_text_source:
> **Eligibility criteria for KALIA Scholarship:**

 1. The children of all the eligible beneficiaries under the KALIA scheme under the two different components, namely Support to Cultivators for Cultivation and Livelihood Support to Landless Agricultural Households are eligible for the scholarship.
 1. The parent of the student must be eligible under KALIA during verification at the Chief District Agriculture Officer (CDAO) level.
 1. The student must have obtained admission in a Government institution of the State on a merit basis. 
 1. The student will not be eligible to get any other scholarship or if he/she is in receipt of another scholarship, he/she will need to shift from the existing scholarship scheme to the KALIA Scholarship, if they so choose. Only one scholarship can be availed.
 1. The students can get KALIA scholarship for one professional course only & shall not be eligible for getting the scholarship for a second professional course.

**Note:** Government Institutions means an organization set up by the State Government to execute its programme is called Government Institution. The institutions set up by the Central Government and Private Institutions or the State Govt. aided Private Institutions shall not come under the Government Institutions.
> **Subjects & Courses eligible for the KALIA Scholarship**

 1. The Professional or Technical graduation courses like M.B.B.S, BDS, BHMS, BAMS, B.Pharma, B.Sc. (Nursing), PBBSc, B.Sc (Agriculture), BVSc & AH, B.Sc (Ho

scheme_name: Krushy Aranya Protsaha Yojane (kapy)
eligibility_text_source:
1. This scheme is open to farmers belonging to all communities.
1. Applicant must have Pahani of the land where planting is being proposed.
1. Registration should be done before the commencement of the rainy season (by the end of May).
1. The following species of trees are not eligible for payment of incentive amount- Eucalyptus, Acacia, Silver Oak (if planted in coffee estate), Casuarina, Cassia siamea (Seemetangadi), Gliricidia, Sesbania, Erythrina, Rubber, Subabul, Coconut, Arecanut, Orange, all types of citrus species and grafted mango.
1. The following documents are required while applying for this scheme - Copy of Aadhaar Card, Passport-sized photograph of the applicant, Pahani of the land where planting is being proposed, Hand-sketch of the land, Details of seedlings (species, number of seedlings, size of poly-bags, etc.), Details of the applicant's bank account.

scheme_name: Basic Kayaking Course
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a youth of Uttarakhand.
1. The applicant must be at least 18 years of age.
1. The applicant should be able to swim 100 meters within 3 minutes.
1. The applicant must be educated.
1. The applicant must be mentally and physically fit.
1. The applicant must have prior training in life-saving techniques and water sports operations from a recognized institute.

> The total number of 15 beneficiaries will be selected.

scheme_name: Kali Bai Bheel Medhavi Chhatra Scooty Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. Girl students who have passed class 12th with a minimum of 65% marks in Rajasthan Board of Secondary Education and passed class 12th with a minimum of 75% marks in Central Board of Secondary Education who are studying in any school in Rajasthan.
1. Graduation degree from any Rajasthan-based college like (B.A.BED/ B.SC.BED/ B.COM.BED/BE / B.TECH/ B.ARCH / MBBS / IIT / BBA / BBM / BCA / BDS / BHMS / BAMS / LAW/ etc.) and studying as a regular student.
1. The benefit of the scheme will not be payable if there is a gap of one year from the year of passing the 12th class in the admission of a bachelor's degree.
1. Girl students getting financial assistance in any other scheme will also be benefited from this scheme. Girl students receiving financial aid/scholarships in any other scheme will not be deprived of this scheme.
1. The girl students who have got the benefit of scooty in any scheme of the state government on the basis of their marks in any class before the implementation of the said scheme, those girl students will not be eligible to get scooty in this scheme. 
1. In the past, on the basis of 10th class results from the TAD Department, School Education Department, if a girl child has received scooty on the basis of 10th result, then that girl student will get a lump sum amount of Rs 40,000 if she is eligible on the basis of 12th result.

scheme_name: Krshak Prashikshan Tatha Bhraman Karyakram
eligibility_text_source:
1. This scheme will apply to all sections.
1. Farmers of all classes who cultivate crops.

scheme_name: Kunwar Bai Nu Mameru Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a native of Gujarat.
 1. The applicant should belong to Scheduled Castes Category.
 1. The annual income limit in this scheme is ₹6,00,000/- in rural areas and ₹6,00,000/- in urban areas.
 1. Benefit under this scheme till the marriage of two (2) adult girls of the family.
 1. In case of remarriage the benefit under this scheme will not be available.
 1. The age limit of the girl at the time of marriage should be 18 years and the age of the boy should be 21 years.
 1. The application for assistance must be made within two years of marriage.
 1. The assistance of the scheme will be available to girls from the Sat Fera Samuh Lagna Yojana.
 1. Beneficiary girls participating in group marriages will be eligible for benefits under both schemes if they fulfill all the conditions of the Sat Fera Samuh Lagna Yojana and Kunwar Bai Nu Mameru Yojana.

scheme_name: Kunwar Bai Nu Mameru Yojana- SEBC & EBC
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a native of Gujarat.
1. The applicant must be a woman belonging to a Socially and Educationally Backward Class (SEBC) or Economically Backward Class (EBC).
1. The annual family income should not exceed ₹6,00,000/-.
1. The marriage must be legally registered.
1. The assistance is limited to two daughters per family.

scheme_name: Kunwar Bai Nu Mameru Yojana Gujarat
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a native of the Gujarat. 
1. The applicant must belong to a Scheduled Tribe. 
1. The applicant's annual family income must not exceed ₹6,00,000/-.
1. The benefits under this scheme are eligible for till the occasion of the marriage of two (2) adult girls of the family.
1. The bride's age must be 18 years at the time of marriage.
1. The groom's age must be 21 years at the time of marriage.

scheme_name: Pension Scheme (K.B.O.C.W.W.B)
eligibility_text_source:
> ***For Registration as a Building/ Construction Worker:***

 - The applicant should be a Building/ Construction Worker (Unorganised Worker).
 - The applicant should be a minimum of 18 years of age.
 - The applicant should have engaged in building and construction work for at least 90 days in a given year.

> **For the Application of the Welfare Scheme:**

 - The applicant should be a registered construction worker Under the Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board of Karnataka.
 - The worker must have reached 60 years of age.
 - The worker must have been a beneficiary of the Board for at least 3 consecutive years before turning 60 years of age.
 - The worker must not be availing similar benefits from any other government schemes.

scheme_name: Krishak Bakri Palan Yojna
eligibility_text_source:
1. Farmers belonging to all categories like general/SC/ST/BPL/Women and Landless persons of Himachal Pradesh are eligible. 
 1. Training/awareness in skills of goat husbandry is mandatory for all applicants. Concerned Senior Veterinary Officer will provide training to interested persons/applicants.
 1. Training/awareness in skills of goat husbandry is mandatory for all applicants. Concerned Senior Veterinary Officer will provide training to interested persons/applicants.

**The preference will be given to:**

 1. Unemployed SC, ST, Women and General category persons. At least 30 percent beneficiaries should be women.
 1. Families where no member is in Government job.
 1. Persons with annual income not exceeding 2 lakh per annum.
 1. Persons/farmers who have built their own goat sheds or built under MGNREGA.

scheme_name: Krishak Bandhu Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
**For Income Support**

 - The applicant must be a resident of West Bengal.
 - The applicant must own cultivable land (up to 2 acres).
 - The applicant must be actively engaged in farming.

**For Death/Disability Benefit**

 - The deceased/disabled person must have been a farmer aged 18–60 years.
 - The applicant must be the legal heir (for death benefit).

scheme_name: Kachara Binane Vaale Hetu Suraksha Upakaran Sahaayata Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
1. Applicant must be a registered waste picker in Chhattisgarh State.
1. Applicant must not be receiving assistance from any other parallel scheme of the state government.
1. Applicant must be between 18 and 60 years old.

scheme_name: Kishori Balika Yojana- Uttarakhand
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
1. The applicant must be an adolescent girl in the age group of 14 to 18 years.
1. The applicant must be residing in one of the aspirational districts of Uttarakhand- Haridwar or Udham Singh Nagar.

scheme_name: Kisan Credit Card
Kisan Credit Card (Pashupalan)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a resident of Madhya Pradesh.
1. The applicant must be a livestock farmer or a member of a primary agricultural credit cooperative society.
1. The applicant should require short-term working capital for livestock activities, including dairy production.

scheme_name: Kisan Credit Card Scheme for Fisheries- Chief Minister Fishermen Prosperity Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a landholding farmer, marginal farmer, small farmer, fish farmer, livestock owner, BPL beneficiary, unorganized worker card holder, or registered worker. 
1. The applicant must be engaged in fisheries activities.

scheme_name: Kalpana Chawla Chatravriti Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a resident of Himachal Pradesh.
1. The applicant must be a girl.
1. The applicant must be a regular student of 10+2, academic, professional or technical course in Science/Arts/Commerce stream.
1. The institution where the applicant is admitted must be a Government / Government Aided / Private School affiliated with the Himachal Pradesh Board of School Education.
1. The scholarship is available for higher education courses, including undergraduate, postgraduate, and professional courses.
1. The scholarship will be given strictly on 10+2 merit declared by the Himachal Pradesh Board of School Education, Dharamshala.

scheme_name: KCR Nutrition Kit
eligibility_text_source:
Pregnant Women: Pregnant women are eligible to receive the nutrition kit under the scheme. The scheme aims to provide support to pregnant women to ensure that they have access to essential nutrients required for a healthy pregnancy.

Age: Minimum 18
Gender: Female
Residence Type: Both

**Resident of Telangana:** The scheme is applicable only to the residents of Telangana. Non-residents of the state are not eligible to receive the nutrition kit.

**Economically Weaker Sections:** The scheme is designed to provide support to the economically weaker sections of society. Families with a monthly income of less than Rs. 10,000 are eligible to receive the nutrition kit.

**Identification by Anganwadi Worker:** The beneficiaries of the scheme are identified by the Anganwadi workers. The workers conduct surveys and identify the eligible beneficiaries based on the eligibility criteria mentioned above.

scheme_name: Dr. K.C. Sharma Fellowship (M.Sc. Agriculture, Agronomy (Second Year) Students)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a student.
 1. The applicant must be enrolled in the second year of the M.Sc. (Agriculture) in Agronomy program at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar.
 1. The fellowship is awarded for a duration of one year only.

scheme_name: Khel Chhatravriti (Vritika) Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a permanent resident of Jharkhand.
1. The applicant should be a sportsperson. 
1. Scholarships are awarded based on performance in the previous year's recognized national or state-level sports competitions.
1. The applicant must not receive any other scholarship or benefits under any other sports scheme, such as free diet, accommodation, or stipend.

**NOTE:** If the applicant is already receiving such benefits, they must forfeit them before applying for this scholarship.

scheme_name: Konkani Drama Competition
eligibility_text_source:
1. The institution’s registration must be active and valid at the time of application.
1. The institution should be registered under the Societies Registration Act, 1860.

scheme_name: Krishak Durghatna Kalyan Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
1. After September 14, 2019, the families of the farmers who were victims of the accident can also get the benefit of the scheme.
1. The age of the applicant farmer should be between 18 to 70 years.
1. After the death of the applicant farmer in the accident, the parents, wife, daughter-in-law, son, daughter, grandson and granddaughter of his family will be provided financial assistance by the government.
1. Those farmers of the state who do not have their own agricultural land and do the work of farming on share or rent.
1. The benefit of UP Chief Minister Farmer Accident Welfare Scheme will be given to the farmer suffering from 60 percent or more disability.

scheme_name: Riyaayati Dar Par Copies Ka Vitaran
eligibility_text_source:
1. Applicant construction workers should be employed in industrial units/establishments falling within the circle's jurisdiction.
1. The benefit extends to a maximum of two children per worker.
1. It is mandatory for the concerned worker to deposit the amount of copies in the board through the institute.

scheme_name: Kanya Dhan Scheme for SC Students
eligibility_text_source:
**For Application**

1. The applicant should be a girl.
1. The applicant should be a student.
1. The applicant should have passed the 10th Standard of examination.
1. The applicant should have appeared in the 11th Standard of any stream (Science/Arts/Commerce/Vocational/ITI).
1. Upto 2 girl children of a family are entitled under this scheme.

**For Disbursal of Benefits**

1. The applicant should have passed the 12th standard examination in three attempts or within two years of the first attempt, whichever is earlier (otherwise, the money shall be forfeited and credited to the Government Treasury).

scheme_name: Kailash Darshan Yatra
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must be a pilgrim from Gujarat.
- The applicant must have completed the Kailash Darshan Yatra.
- The applicant must apply within 90 days of yatra completion.
- The applicant must not have availed of the benefit before under this scheme.

scheme_name: Kasturba Gandhi Residential Girls’ Hostel
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant (girl student) must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
 1. The applicant should be a studying at the upper primary or secondary level (Class 6 to Class 12).
 1. In line with the target group of the scheme, 75% of the seats in KGBVs are reserved for girls from SC, ST, OBC, and minority communities, while the remaining 25% are reserved for girls from families living Below Poverty Line (BPL).
 1. In addition, girls from economically weaker families (with an annual income of less than ₹55,000/-) or those who have lost both parents or one parent will also be eligible for admission.

scheme_name: Kendriya Grihmantri Dakshata Padak
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a member of Police Forces, Security Organizations, Intelligence Wings, or Forensic Science Institutions.
1. The applicant should demonstrate excellence in Special Operation, Investigation, Intelligence, or Forensic Science.
1. The applicant should not have any pending judicial proceedings or departmental enquiry.
1. The applicant should not have received any major penalty in the last 5 years.
1. The applicant should be recommended by the concerned authority.
1. The applicant should not be recommended for multiple fields for the same operation.
1. The applicant should meet specific criteria for the respective field (operation, investigation, intelligence, or forensic work).

scheme_name: Kala Gaurav Puraskar
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be an individual artist.
1. The applicant should be 60 years of age.
1. The applicant should have given a substantial contribution in his/her respective field of art.
1. The applicant should have contributed in his/her respective field of art in Goa for a minimum of 10 years out of his/her entire career as a practising artist.

scheme_name: Kasturba Gandhi Special Term Deposit Receipt Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
> **General Eligibility**

1. The applicant should be a native of Rajasthan state.
1. The applicant should be a girl student.
1. The applicant should have passed the 8th class from a Kasturba Gandhi Residential Girls School in Rajasthan.
> **Eligibility Criteria for Class 10****th** **Students**

1. The applicant should have passed the 10th class with a minimum of 50% marks while studying in a government school. 1. The applicant should be enrolled in the 11th class in a government school. 
> **Eligibility Criteria for Class 12****th** **Students**

1. The applicant should have passed class 12th with at least 50% marks from a government school 1. The applicant should be enrolled in the first year of a recognized undergraduate course.

scheme_name: Establishment of Poultry Valley
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
 1. The applicant must be a member of a Multi-Purpose Agricultural Cooperative Society (MPACS).
 1. Preference will be given to female beneficiaries under this scheme.
 1. The applicant must not have any outstanding loans from MPACS or any other bank.
 1. The selected applicant must be eligible to receive Medium-Term (MT) and Short-Term (ST) loans under the Deendayal Upadhyaya Krishi Kalyan Yojana.
 1. The applicant must own or have land on lease.

scheme_name: Sports Scholarship (UG) - Uttarakhand
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a student.
 1. The applicant must be enrolled in the first year of an undergraduate course at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar.
 1. The applicant must be one of the six selected students eligible to receive this benefit.

scheme_name: Krishi Input Anudan Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a farmer.
 1. The applicant should belong to the reported Panchayats of the identified blocks in the specified districts.
 1. The applicant must be registered on the DBT portal.
 1. Applicant's bank account must be linked with the Aadhaar number,

> Note: Farmers cultivating on others' land will be identified and verified as "actual cultivators" through joint certification by the Agriculture Coordinator and Farmer Advisor. This process ensures that only genuine cultivators receive subsidy benefits.

scheme_name: Khule Jalsroto Mei Pen Aadharit Matsya Paalan ki Yojana
eligibility_text_source: - Groups formed from lessees of the committee in Man, Chaur, and Lake are eligible to apply.

scheme_name: Silkworm Rearing Chamber
eligibility_text_source:
1. The beneficiary must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
 1. The beneficiary must have availed assistance under the Silk Tree Plantation Scheme.
 1. The beneficiary must have at least 300 mulberry plants available for silkworm rearing.

scheme_name: Janshree Bima Yojana for Khadi Artisans
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a Khadi Artisan (Khadi Karigar).
1. The age of the applicant must be between 18 and 59 years.
1. The applicant must be a member of the approved vocation/occupation groups.
1. The group must have a minimum of 25 members.

scheme_name: Kalakar Kritadnyata Nidhi: Compensation Towards Natural Calamities
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must be a Goan, i.e., born and brought up in Goa.
- The applicant must be recognized as an artist by the Directorate of Art & Culture, Government of Goa.
- The income of the family of the applicant (from all sources) must not exceed ₹2,00,000/- per annum.
- The artist must not be less than 50 years in age. (The Government may relax the age criteria for deserving cases under special circumstances.)
- The applicant must be in need of funds to meet expenses towards repair or construction of their house damaged due to natural calamities.

scheme_name: Kalakar Kritadnyata Nidhi: Financial Assistance For Funeral of the Artist
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must be a family member of the deceased artist.
- The deceased artist must have been born and brought up in Goa.
- The deceased artist must have been recognized by the Directorate of Art & Culture, Government of Goa.
- The family income of the deceased artist (from all sources) must not exceed ₹2,00,000/- per annum.
- The applicant must not have claimed or received funeral assistance benefits from any other government source for the same purpose.

scheme_name: Kalakar Kritadnyata Nidhi: Incentive for Self Employment
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must be Goan, i.e., born and brought up in Goa.
- The artist must be an artist recognized by the Directorate of Art & Culture, Government of Goa.
- The income of the family of the applicant (from all sources) must not exceed ₹2,00,000/- per annum.
- The applicant must not be less than 50 years in age. (The Government may relax the age criteria for deserving cases under special circumstances.)
- The applicant must not be employed or self-employed at the time of application.

scheme_name: Kalakar Kritadnyata Nidhi: Lumpsum Grant
eligibility_text_source:
- The deceased artist must have been Goan, i.e., born and brought up in Goa.
- The deceased artist must have been recognized by the Directorate of Art & Culture, Government of Goa.
- The deceased artist must not have been less than 50 years in age. (The Government may relax the age criteria for deserving cases under special circumstances.)
- The applicant must be the dependent family member of the deceased artist.
- The wife/husband of the late artist shall be considered first for the grant.
- In the event of the wife/husband predeceasing the late artist, the benefit shall be passed on to the unmarried/unemployed sons/daughters of the deceased artist as the case may be in equal ratio.
- The annual income of the family of the deceased artist (from all the sources) must be less than ₹25,000/- per annum.

scheme_name: Kalakar Kritadnyata Nidhi: Marriage Component
eligibility_text_source:
##### ***For the Artist***

- The applicant must be a Goan aged needy artist, born and brought up in the state of Goa.
- The applicant must be recognized by the Directorate of Art & Culture, Government of Goa.
- The applicant must be not less than 50 years of age.
- The applicant's annual family income from all the sources should not exceed ₹2,00,000/- per annum.

##### ***For Dependent Daughter(s)***

- The daughters must be wholly dependent on the eligible Goan artist.
- The daughters must be unmarried at the time of application.
- Maximum two wholly dependent unmarried daughters shall be eligible.

##### ***Relaxation***

- The Government may relax the age criteria for the artist for deserving cases under special circumstances.

scheme_name: Kalakar Kritadnyata Nidhi: Medical Treatment
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must be any Goan aged needy artist, born and brought up in the state of Goa.
- The applicant must be recognized by the Directorate of Art & Culture, Government of Goa.
- The applicant must have an annual family income from all sources not exceeding ₹2,00,000/- per annum.
- The applicant must be not less than 50 years of age.

**Relaxation**
The Government may relax the age criteria for deserving cases under special circumstances.

scheme_name: Kalakar Kritadnyata Nidhi: Pandemics
eligibility_text_source:
- The artist must be a resident of Goa.
- The artist must be above 18 years of age.
- The artist must have lost the source of income due to the pandemic of COVID-19.
- The individual income of the artist (from all the sources) must not exceed ₹1,50,000/- per annum. 
- The artist should be working and contributing in the field of art and culture fields, i.e. Music/Dance/Drama/Tiatr/ Folk/Kir tan/Bhajan/Painting/Sculpture/Literature/Cantarists/Sahittik/Poets/Photographers/traditional Handicraft etc. 
- Artists should be in need of such financial assistance as contemplated in the scheme. 
- The artist should solely be dependent on the art related activities/programmes. 
- The artist shall not be a Government employee or an employee of Autonomous bodies, Corporations nor pensioner of any organization.

scheme_name: Kalakar Kritadnyata Nidhi: Scholarships/Incentives
eligibility_text_source:
##### ***For the Artist***

- The artist must be a Goan, i.e., born and brought up in Goa.
- The artist must be recognized by the Directorate of Art & Culture, Government of Goa.
- The income of the family of the artist (from all sources) must not exceed ₹2,00,000/- per annum.
- The artist must not be less than 50 years in age. (The Government may relax the age criteria for deserving cases under special circumstances.)

##### ***For the Ward of the Artist***

- The ward must be enrolled in a recognized educational institution.
- The ward must be pursuing Postgraduate, Degree, or Professional courses.
- The ward may be enrolled in educational institutions within the state or outside the state.

scheme_name: Khushiyon Ki Sawari Sewa - Uttarakhand
eligibility_text_source:
1. The beneficiary must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
 1. The beneficiary must be a pregnant woman or a newborn baby aged 0 to 1 year.

scheme_name: Kantedar Tarbandi Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
1. This scheme is available to all categories of farmers.
1. For individual farmers and farmer groups, the applicant must possess a minimum of 1.5 hectares of land at a single location.
1. In Scheduled Tribe areas, a minimum of 0.5 hectares of land at one location is required.
1. For community applications, a group comprising 10 or more farmers must collectively own a minimum of 5 hectares of land.
1. Additionally, the boundaries of the group's land must fall within the specified perimeter.

scheme_name: Kisan Kaleva Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be Hamal/Palledar/Tulara of the farmers coming to sell agricultural commodities.
- The applicant should be a member of the market premises.
- The applicant should be a license holder of the market.

scheme_name: Kishan Kalpvriksh Yojana (Scheme for Assistance to APMCs to Provide Basic and Modern Facilities) (General)
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be an Agricultural Produce Market Committee (APMC) operating in the state of Gujarat.
 - The applicant APMC should belong to either Class 'A', 'B', 'C', or 'D' as categorized by the government.
 - The applicant APMC must be engaged in facilitating agricultural produce marketing and must require infrastructure support for modernization.
 - The applicant must submit a proposal for the development of specific facilities as per the scheme's focus areas.

scheme_name: Kishan Kalpvriksh Yojana (Scheme for Assistance to APMCs to Provide Basic and Modern Facilities) (Tribal)
eligibility_text_source:
- Co-operative Agricultural Produce Market Committees (APMC) shall be eligible under this scheme.
 - The applicant APMC must be located in designated tribal areas within Gujarat.

scheme_name: Kalyana Lakshmi Pathakam
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be an unmarried girl belonging to the SC/ST/BC/EBC community.
 1. The applicant should be a resident of Telangana.
 1. The applicant should be 18 years of age at the time of marriage.
 1. The applicant's marriage should be scheduled on or after October 2, 2014.
 1. The applicant’s parental income should not exceed ₹2,00,000/- per annum.

> **Note:** Enhanced financial support is available for disabled girls under Section 24(1) of the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016.

scheme_name: Kam Lagat Pyaaj Bhandaran Sanrachna
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a native of Rajasthan.
1. The applicant should be a Farmer.
1. The applicant must have a minimum of 0.5 land ownership.
1. A farmer who is cultivating onion and wants to build a low-cost onion storage structure.

scheme_name: Krushi Mahotsav
eligibility_text_source:
**Eligibility**

 1. All farmers and Female farmers of the state.
 1. The scheme is available to all farmers in the state of Gujarat.
 1. There are no restrictions based on caste, religion, or gender.
 1. Farmers who are interested in learning about the latest agricultural practices and improving their crop yields are encouraged to participate.

scheme_name: Khel Mahakumbh
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be a native of Gujarat or should have been studying, residing, working, or doing business in Gujarat for the past 2 years.
 - Students must participate from the taluka/district where their school or college is located.
 - Employees transferred from other states are eligible if their transfer to the district occurred at least 6 months before the date of registration.

**Note:** The applicant can register for a maximum of 2 sports only.

scheme_name: Kailash Mansarovar Yatra- Madhya Pradesh
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a native of Madhya Pradesh.
 1. The applicant must have completed the Kailash Mansarovar Yatra after being selected by the Ministry of External Affairs, Government of India.
 1. Only individuals who have been selected by the Ministry of External Affairs, Government of India, for the pilgrimage are eligible for the benefits of this scheme.
 1. The applicant should not be an income taxpayer.
 1. Each individual is eligible for the grant only once in their lifetime.

**Note 1:** To avail of the benefits of this scheme, pilgrims must submit all documents detailing their actual expenses incurred during the journey.
**Note 2:** If both husband and wife are selected for the pilgrimage, their eligibility for travel benefits will be as per the guidelines of the Ministry of External Affairs, Government of India.

scheme_name: Kailash Mansarovar Yatra Scheme 2016
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of the Haryana State.
 1. The applicant/pilgrim should complete the Yatra through the Ministry of External Affairs, Govt. of India and the completion certificate in this regard must be obtained from the Ministry of External Affairs, Govt. of India.
 1. The financial assistance shall be given only once to a pilgrim.

scheme_name: Karmaveer Padmashri Dadasaheb Gaikwad Birth Centenary And Prize Distribution
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should have done a social movement work.
1. The applicant should be from a Social Welfare Sector or Institute, and should be registered.
1. The period of the Social Service by the applicant should be 15 years & above.
1. For male applicants, the age should not be below 50 years. For female applicants, the age should not be below 40 years.
1. The applicant should be a citizen of India.
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of Maharashtra State.

scheme_name: Organising Sports Competitions and Training Camps
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
1. The applicant must be a player aged 8 to 16 years.
1. In the case of amateur players, the applicant must be above 16 years of age.

scheme_name: Kamban Pugazh Literary Prize
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be an author/writer.
1. The applicant should be a native of Puducherry by virtue of birth or continuous residence of not less than five years.
1. The applicant should publish the best novel, short story, drama, poetry and prose.
1. First edition of the book should be published between 1st January and 31st December.
1. The publication must be of creative literature of their own.
1. The book should not be an abridged version of an imitation or translated version of another book or synopsis.
1. The literary critics/ thesis research presented to university degrees or examinations are not eligible for award
1. The author once awarded is not eligible to participate in the award for the next four consecutive years.
1. The books sent for the prize should be those not awarded by other Government / Non-Government Organizations and Voluntary Literary Organizations.

scheme_name: Khel Pratibha Puraskar
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant should be a sportsperson.
 - The applicant should have won a medal at a national or international level.
 - The applicant should be a resident of Gujarat or should be representing Gujarat officially in the sporting event.

scheme_name: Kalyanamastu Pathakam Scheme - Andhra Pradesh
eligibility_text_source:
> **Bride:**

1. The applicant (Bride) should have completed 18 years of age at the time of marriage.
1. The bride and her parents should belong to the Brahmin community. 
1. The bride should be enrolled in the Praja Sadhikara Survey (PSS). 

> **Bridegroom:**

1. The bridegroom should have completed 21 years at the time of marriage. 
1. The bridegroom should be a Brahmin resident of Andhra Pradesh and his livelihood should come from Pourohityam or Veda Parayanam or Archakatvam. 
1. The bridegroom should not be a full-time employee/businessman/professional in other professions or an Industrialist.

scheme_name: Farmer Pension Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a permanent resident of Uttarakhand.
1. The applicant must be a farmer actively engaged in cultivating their own land.
1. The applicant must be above 60 years of age.
1. The applicant must own and cultivate up to 2 hectares of agricultural land.

scheme_name: Kisan Parivahan Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must be a farmer.
- The applicant must belong to the Gujarat state.
- The applicant must purchase a medium-sized goods vehicle (600kg to 1500kg capacity) from an [authorized dealer](https://ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in/Public/frm_Public_DealerDetails.aspx).

scheme_name: Khiladi Protsahan Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a native of Madhya Pradesh.
1. Family members registered under MP Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
1. The applicant should be a bank account.

scheme_name: Kumar Rajratna Bhimrao Ambedkar Medical Assistance Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of Gujarat.
1. The applicant should belong to the Scheduled Caste (SC) category.
1. The applicant should be suffering from an incurable or critical disease such as TB or Leukemia, as certified by a civil surgeon.
1. The family income of the applicant should not exceed ₹6,00,000/- per annum.

scheme_name: Khushi Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a resident of Odisha.
1. All school girls from classes 6th to 12th are eligible.

scheme_name: Kharmore Sonchidia Award Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a farmer or landowner.
1. The applicant should own private land.
1. Either Kharmor Bird or Golden Bird should have been sighted on the applicant’s land.
1. The applicant should have ensured the protection of the birds, their eggs, and their habitat without causing harm.

scheme_name: Kanyadaan Scheme (CBOCWWB)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant/beneficiary should be working in the Establishment, registered under the Punjab Labour Welfare Fund Act, 1965 and his contribution towards the labour welfare fund should regularly been received by the Board.
2. The applicant shall be eligible to avail the benefit of the scheme only after 06 months of becoming a member of the Board.
3. The beneficiary hasn’t claimed/availed of such kind of benefits prevailing under the Central/State Govt. Schemes. If both the father and daughter are working in the same establishment, the benefit shall be granted to one of them.
4. This benefit will be given only on the production of a Marriage Registration Certificate.
5. The benefit of the scheme shall be given for two daughters only.
6. The applicant should apply for the ‘Kanyadaan Scheme’ within three months from the date of marriage.
7. Female registered workers can avail the benefit of this scheme on the eve of their self-marriage.

scheme_name: KSCSTE Emeritus Scientist Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. Applicant should be a Permanent Resident of Kerala.
 1. Candidates should be retired scientists/academicians in Kerala by birth or domicile and should have worked as a scientist/academician in reputed institutions with commendable scientific achievements.
 1. Candidate should apply within 5 years of superannuation.
 1. The candidate should have published a minimum of 3 peer-reviewed research papers with SCI-indexed journals with an impact factor greater than 2.0 or should have filed at least one patent in the last 3 years of application.
 1. Those who have availed Emeritus Scientist Fellowship earlier (from KSCSTE or elsewhere) are not eligible to apply.
 1. The Research Centre selected for the proposed work should be the R&D Centres of KSCSTE.

scheme_name: KSCSTE Post-Doctoral Fellowship Programme
eligibility_text_source:
1. Applicant should be a Permanent Resident of Kerala.
2. Applicant should have scored a minimum of 60% marks for post-graduation.
3. Applicant should have qualified Ph.D. in Science/Engineering subjects.
4. Applicant should not be a permanent employee at the time of application for the scheme.
5. Age limit: 40 years - (relaxed for 3 years for OBC and 5 years for SC/ST candidate).
6. Those who have availed Post-Doctoral Fellowship earlier from KSCSTE or elsewhere are not eligible to apply for KSCSTE Post-Doctoral Fellowship.
7. Applicant should have published at least one research paper in a SCI Journal/secured patent.
8. Those who have already availed of one Post-Doctoral Fellowship from KSCSTE or elsewhere are not eligible to apply.
9. Applicant should have chosen an institution as a research Centre subject to the following:

 - The Research Centre should not be the same as Ph.D Research Centre.
 - Research Centre should preferably be in Kerala, [however, premier National Institutions viz., IISER, IIT, IISc etc. outside the State shall also be considered].
 - Tenable in Government Institutions only.
 - Tenable only in R&D institutions (National/State level) or University Departments.

scheme_name: KSCSTE Research Fellowship
eligibility_text_source:
1. Candidates, who have qualified for the post-graduate degree, shall have three consecutive chances to apply for the Fellowship programme. Thus, a candidate who has passed the examination in the current year can apply in this year, the next year, and the year after next.
 1. The candidates (General and OBC candidates) should have a minimum of 70% marks or equivalent CGPA in their PG examination and 65% for SC/ST and differently-abled candidates.
 1. Only candidates who have their qualifying degree (PG) from any of the Universities in Kerala are eligible to apply.
 1. Upper age limit: Maximum 35 years (Should not exceed 35 years as of the 1st of the month of the advertisement published on the website) for all applicants.

scheme_name: Karkhandar Scheme For Development Of Craft Sector
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant must be a pass-out trainee/ex-trainee from a departmental training center.
1. The departmental training center must be run by the Handicrafts & Handloom Department.
1. The applicant must have an Aadhaar linked Bank Account.

scheme_name: Kotwar Cycle Evam Torch Sahayata Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
1. Applicant must be registered as an unorganized worker in any district of the state.
1. Applicant must be between the ages of 18 and 60.
1. Applicant should not have received a cycle or torch under the cycle assistance scheme implemented by the board or any other scheme implemented by other departments of the state government.

scheme_name: Kashyapa Scheme for Food & Shelter
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should belong to the Brahmin community and reside in Andhra Pradesh. 
1. The applicant should be a holder of a white ration card. 
1. The applicant's annual family income should not exceed ₹75,000/-. 
1. The orphan children below 14 years of age as of 31st Jan 2019. 
1. The Elderly above 60 years of age as of 31st Jan 2019. 
1. All differently abled of any age and widows & destitute women (separated from husband, but do not have legal documents) of any age. 
1. The applicant should not have availed himself/ herself of any amount under any other Government scheme for the same purpose.

scheme_name: Kanyadaan Scheme (HBOCWWB)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be registered under the Haryana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
 1. The registered worker must have a minimum of one year’s regular membership.
 1. The registered member must have worked for 90 days as a Building and Other Construction Worker during the preceding twelve months.
 1. The worker must have paid up-to-date contributions.
 1. The benefit is payable upto the marriage of three daughters only.
 1. The applicant should submit all the documents within one year after the marriage.
 1. The applicant should not avail of this assistance from any other government department/board/corporation.

**Note 01:** The worker has to produce a work experience certificate duly verified by the prescribed authorities.
**Note 02:** The worker has to upload the Marriage Certificate of the daughter.
**Note 03:** The worker/applicant shall submit the undertaking prescribed by the Board.

scheme_name: Kera Suraksha Insurance Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a Coconut Tree Climber/Neera Technician/Coconut Harvester/Trainee.
 1. The age of the applicant should be between 18 to 65 years.

> **Responsibilities of Climbers /Harvesters/Neera Technicians/Trainees(Beneficiaries):**

 1. Submit applications for insurance under the insurance scheme in the prescribed format with all mandatory documents. 
 1. Payment of his/her/their share of premium prescribed by the Board by way of demand draft/ online mode. 
 1. Safe custody of policy document/ policy number received from the Board 
 1. Intimation of accident within 72 hours of its occurrence to Board. 
 1. Submission of claim form along with mandatory documents to Board, in case of accidents-related hospital expenses/death, for getting benefits under the scheme.

scheme_name: Konkani Song & Music Awards (Tiatr Kantaram)
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must produce Konkani Audio Compact Disc/Video Compact Disc/Digital Versatile Disc/Digital Albums between 1st January and 31st December of the year identified by Tiatr Academy of Goa.
- The applicant must ensure the music director is compulsorily a Goan or of Goan origin.
- The applicant must ensure singers in the Album are Goans whose mother tongue is Konkani.
- The applicant must ensure the Album contains songs only in Konkani language and not in other languages like English, Hindi, Portuguese etc.
- The applicant must ensure the songs in the Album are not old songs or remix of old songs.
- The applicant must ensure the Audio Compact Disc/Video Compact Disc/Digital Versatile Disc/Digital Albums consists of minimum 8 Konkani kantaram.
- The applicant must ensure there are no adverse remarks in any form against any Governments/Individuals/Institutions or against caste, creed and religion in the lyrics of songs/performances/speeches.

***Competition Requirements***

- The applicant must ensure there are minimum three entries in each category to participate in that particular category competition.
- The applicant must ensure for Best Album award, the album has at least 5 kantaram from specified categories: one solo, one duet (interactive lyrics), one duo (interactive lyrics), one trio (interactive lyrics), one quartet/quintet (interactive lyrics), one choral song.

***Child Singer Category***

- The applicant must ensure child singers have not completed 16 years

scheme_name: Kerala Stressed MSMEs Revival & Rehabilitation Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. A MSME unit/enterprise which satisfies the following conditions is eligible for the scheme:

 - MSME in the manufacturing category and set up in Kerala state.
 - Does not come under the Negative List.
 - Must have filed EM Part-II/UAM.
 - Must come under the definition of Sick Unit and
 - Must be Potentially Viable to be revived or restructured based on a definite Revival Project Report.

2. For the purpose of this scheme, an industrial unit eligible for the assistance shall be an independent legal entity.
> **Obligation of the applicant unit:**

1. The applicant unit shall provide all required details in time and declare such information as to be true.
2. The applicant unit shall provide clarification if any sought by vyavasaya mithra.
3. The applicant unit shall utilize the amount received as assistance only in the manner agreed upon.
4. The applicant units thus revived shall restart within one month of the date of receipt of financial assistance and shall be under obligation to function continuously for a further period of 5 years. Otherwise, the assistance given shall be recovered under the Kerala Revenue Recovery Act.
5. Units becoming sick on account of willful mismanagement, willful default, unauthorized diversion of funds, dispute among Partners/Promoters, etc. should not be considered for rehabilitation.

scheme_name: Karma Sathi Prakalpa
eligibility_text_source:
1. Any intending or, prospective entrepreneur fulfilling the conditions below can apply. Only one member of a family shall be eligible to apply under this Scheme, where "family" means parents and spouse.

- **Age:** Any intending or prospective entrepreneur in the age group 18 - 50 years(from the date of notification, September 2020).- **Educational Qualification:** Minimum Class VIII passed. Preference will be given to intending entrepreneurs who are registered with the Employment Bank.- Any new income-generating activity taken up for self-employment in manufacturing, services, and trading will be eligible for assistance under the scheme.

scheme_name: Kishor Swasthya Paramarsh Clinic - Uttarakhand
eligibility_text_source: 1. The beneficiary must be an adolescent between 10 and 19 years of age from Uttarakhand.

scheme_name: Kanya Saksharta Protsahan Yojana
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a girl.
 1. The girl student should be a native/resident of Madhya Pradesh.
 1. The girl student should belong to the Scheduled Tribe community.
 1. The applicant should be a regular student.
 1. All girls who have passed Class 10th and are entering Class 11th are eligible for the scheme.

scheme_name: Kanya Saksharta Protsahan Yojana (For Scheduled Caste Girls)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a girl student.
 1. The girl student should be a native of Madhya Pradesh.
 1. The girl student should belong to the Scheduled Caste category.
 1. All Scheduled Caste girl students who have passed Class 10 and are entering Class 11 are eligible for the scheme.
 1. The parents or guardians of the applicant should not be income taxpayers.
 1. The girl student should be pursuing her education continuously.
 1. The girl student should be enrolled in a government or recognized government school/institution and attend regularly.

scheme_name: Kala Samman Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be an artist who is in indigent condition.
1. The applicant should have attained the age of 60 years.
1. The applicant should have given a contribution to the field of Art and culture or should have worked in the field of Art and culture.
1. The income of the applicant should not exceed ₹ 48,000/- per annum. (However, this clause shall not be applicable, where the applicant is the recipient of the ‘State Cultural Award').

**NOTE:** The number of cases to be sanctioned shall depend upon the availability of funds for every financial year.

scheme_name: Kayaka Spoorthi Scheme Karnataka
eligibility_text_source:
1. A Self-Help Group must have at least 10 female artisans to be eligible.
1. The applicant should belongs to sub-castes Arundathiyar, Chammadiya, Chamar, Chambar, Chamagar, Madar, Madig, Madiga, Mini Madig, Jambavalu, Haralayya, Machigar, Mochigar, Mochi, muchi, Telugu Mochi, kamaati mocha, Rohidas, Dhor, kakkayya, Kankayya, Samagara, Samagar, Aadhi Anddra, Aadhi Dravida, Aadhi Karnataka among schedule castes.
1. The age of the applicant should be 18 years.

If a woman has a girl child from the first delivery and only two twin girls from the second delivery, then only in such a situation the benefit will be admissible to all three girls.

scheme_name: Kisan Vikas Patra Scheme
eligibility_text_source:
1. Any individual who is a resident of India can avail of the benefits under the scheme.
 1. A parent/guardian may invest on behalf of a minor or person of unsound mind.
 1. The minimum age of minors should be 10 years.

> **Deposits:**

 - A minimum of ₹1000/- and any sum in multiples of ₹100/-, may be deposited in an account.
 - There shall be no maximum limit for deposits in an account or in accounts held by an account holder.
 - An individual may open any number of accounts.

> **Payment on maturity:**

 - The maturity period of an account opened between 12th December 2019 to 31st March 2020 (both days inclusive) shall be 9 years and five months. Deposit made in the account shall double on maturity and the amount of maturity may be repaid to the account holder.
 - The maturity period of an account opened on or after the first day of April 2020 shall be 10 years and four months. Deposit made in the account shall double on maturity.
 - The maturity period of the deposit under this Scheme shall be determined by the rate of interest applicable at the time of opening the account.

scheme_name: Lifetime Contribution to Konkani Cinema Award
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must be not less than 60 years of age.
- The applicant must have contributed to Konkani Cinema development.

**Relaxation**

- The age limit of 60 years may be relaxed if the health of the artiste is not well.

**Selection Considerations**

- The applicant should demonstrate excellence as an actor, script writer, director, playback singer, lyricist, producer, or composer.
- The applicant may have received awards in their respective field.
- The applicant should have done innovation on the Konkani Cinema front.
- The applicant, if a singer/musician, should have songs recorded on vinyl records, Compact Discs, Digital Versatile Discs, online platforms, or brought out in video format.
- The applicant may have worked in films of other languages in various capacities including acting, directing, singing, composing music, composing lyrics, designing sets, providing background music, or designing light effects.
- The applicant, if a script writer or lyricist, may have published books of their scripts or lyrics.

scheme_name: Lifetime Contribution to Khell/Khell-Tiatr Awards
eligibility_text_source:
- The applicant must be not less than 60 years of age.
- The applicant must have at least 10 years of contribution in the field of Khell-Tiatr.
- The applicant must demonstrate excellence as an actor, script writer, director, singer, lyricist, set designer, or other theatrical role in Khell/Khell-Tiatr.
- The applicant who is an actor/singer/stage manager/lights effects provider/make-up artist/costume designer/live music/background music provider must have performed in at least 10 khell-tiatrs.
- The applicant who is a writer/director must have written/directed at least 10 khell-tiatrs.

_*Award can only be received once in a lifetime across all related categories._
##### ***Evaluation Considerations***

- The applicant's innovative contributions to the presentation of Khell/Khell-Tiatr will be evaluated.
- The applicant's work in other languages or films beyond Khell/Khell-Tiatr will be considered.
- The applicant's published books of scripts/lyrics will be taken into account.
- The applicant's previous awards in the field will be considered.

##### ***Relaxation***
Age limit may be relaxed if the health of the artiste is not well.

scheme_name: Lifetime Contribution to Tiatr Awards (Commercial)

- The applicant, if a writer/director, must have written/directed at least 20 tiatrs.
- *The age limit of 60 years may be relaxed if the health of the artist is not well.

##### ***Assessment Criteria***
The applicant's excellence as an actor, script writer, director, singer, lyricist, set designer will be considered.
The applicant's receipt of any awards in their field will be evaluated.
The applicant's innovations on the tiatr stage will be assessed.
The applicant's songs (kantaram) recorded on records, cassettes, CDs/DVDs or online will be considered (if singer/musician).
The applicant's work in dramas in other languages or films besides tiatr will be evaluated.
The applicant's published books of scripts/lyrics will be considered (if script writer or lyricist).
##### ***Post-Selection Conditions***
The applicant must be compulsorily present in person to receive the award.

scheme_name: Lifetime Contribution to Tiatr Awards (Non-Commercial)
eligibility_text_source:

***Relaxation***
The age limit of 60 years may be relaxed if the health of the artiste is not well.
***Post-Selection Conditions***
*The selected artistes will have to be compulsorily present in person to receive the award.
*Tiatr Academy of Goa will confer Lifetime Contribution to Tiatr Awards only once in a lifetime be it in Tiatr (Commercial/Non-Commercial) or Khell or Khell-Tiatr or Konkani Cinema.

eligibility_text_source:
Indian students from recognized universities in India or abroad who have attained a minimum of 60% marks in their most recent degree or certificate examination and fall under one of the following categories:
• Completion of education under the 10+2+3 schooling pattern, indicating completing 15 years of formal education. Or
• Completion of a Polytechnic Diploma/Degree. Or
• Pursuing the 4th year in the Engineering stream under the 10+2+4 pattern of education. Or

> **NOTE 1:** Qualifications may be relaxed in deserving cases based on the Authority's requirements, as recommended by the Member (Finance), LPAI, and subject to prior approval from the Chairman, LPAI.

Preference will be given to candidates with exposure in the intended internship area, a solid academic background, and higher capability per the organization's needs. scheme_name: Livelihood Support To Marine Fishermen During Fishing Ban Period
eligibility_text_source:
**The following are the eligibility criteria for the beneficiary:**

 1. The beneficiary must be an active Marine fisherman.
 1. The assistance will be provided to only one member of a family on behalf of the family.
 1. The beneficiary must be in the age group of 18-70 years.
 1. The beneficiary must be a permanent resident of Odisha and must possess identity and residential proof including an Aadhaar card.
 1. The beneficiary must have a bank account in his/her name in the state of Odisha.
 1. The beneficiary must be a boat owner (Motorized Boat)/ a crew member of a Motorized Boat / Fish trader/ engaged in sorting, and grading Fish, and other ancillary activities.
 1. The Fishers should preferably belong to the BPL Category i.e. covered under the National Food Security Act (NFSA) and not belong to the automatically excluded household under the socio-economic and caste census (SECC)-2011.
 1. If the fisherman is a Boat Owner, he must have valid registration (Real Craft) and a valid fishing license.
 1. If the fisherman is a crew member, he must work in a registered fishing boat with a valid date fishing license and will produce a certificate from the boat owner in this respect.
 1. If the fisherman is a Fish trader / engaged in sorting, grading of Fish, and other ancillary activities he must produce a certificate from a registered boat owner in this respect.

scheme_name: Long Term-Loan to SC Co-op Spinning Mills under Special Component Plan
eligibility_text_source:

> **Recognized Institutions for Enumeration**

1. Maharashtra Industrial & Technical Consultancy Organization Ltd. (MITCON), Pune.
1. Agriculture Financial Corporation, Mumbai.
1. Dattajirao Technical Institute, Ichalkaranji.

scheme_name: Loans for Tools (MBOCWWB)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The beneficiary should be a resident of Meghalaya.

 1. The beneficiary who has completed 3 years of membership in the fund will be eligible for this loan.
 1. The beneficiary who remits contributions regularly will be eligible for this loan.
 1. The beneficiary should have completed 55 years.

**Note 01:** Operation and maintenance of the tool shall be the sole responsibility of the beneficiary, and the Board shall not be responsible for any after-sales service, parts, or accessories.
**Note 02:** The grant shall be sanctioned subject to the production of a valid cash memo or voucher from an authorized dealer by the BOCW beneficiary and the tools shall be produced before an official of the Board for inspection & photograph.
**Note 03:** The Board shall emboss a mark (logo or serial No) onto the tool after production & inspection. A tool so marked cannot be produced again for any subsequent claim(s).
**Note 04:** A beneficiary is prohibited from selling the tools purchased and shall not be entitled to a second grant.
**Note 05:** The loan amount shall be recovered in not more than sixty installments.

scheme_name: Low Tension Power Tariff (LTPT) Subsidy
eligibility_text_source:
> **For New Enterprises**

- All new Micro manufacturing enterprises established anywhere in the State
- All new Small and Medium manufacturing enterprises established in all the 251 industrially backward blocks.
- All new Agro-based industries in 385 blocks in the state.

> **For Expansion/diversification Enterprises**

- Existing Manufacturing Enterprises of the above categories that have taken up substantial expansion/diversification of the existing activities, subject to the condition that expansion ( or) diversification involves enhancement of plant and machinery value by at least 25 % of the value of existing plant and machinery and also involving enhancement of turnover by 25 % for the same product (or) new products lines.

**NOTE:** Only the enterprises using Low Tension Power supply (Tariff III B) are eligible.

> **Cases Involved in Multiple Service Connection of an Enterprise**

In cases of enterprises having multiple LT connections in the same premises, LTPT subsidy would be eligible for the first service connection only. However, if the enterprise has branch unit(s) in a different location(s) then an LTPT subsidy will be given to each of the LT connections (first LT service connection only)subject to the satisfaction of the above norm.

scheme_name: Meghalaya Any Business Venture Scheme

scheme_name: Marriage Assistance To Differently Abled Women (Parinayam-II)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of Kerala.
 1. The parents of differently abled girls or differently abled girls should be eligible to apply under the scheme.
 1. The girl who intends to be married should have completed 18 years of age. 
 1. The combined annual family income should not exceed ₹1,00,000/-.

**Note 01:** After receiving the financial aid as per these terms and conditions, if the marriage has to be dissolved for any reason and the girl has to marry a second time, the financial aid can be given for the second marriage.
**Note 02:** If the applicant with disabilities dies before the marriage of the daughters, the said financial assistance can be given to the eldest member of the family or any other member of the family who is responsible for conducting the marriage. 
**Note 03:** In case the applicant PWD dies after the marriage of his daughter but before receiving financial assistance, the senior member of the family or the married member or the individual can be given financial assistance on a suitable bond.

scheme_name: Marriage Assistance To Daughters Of Differently Abled Parents (Parinayam-I)
eligibility_text_source:
1. The applicant should be a permanent resident of Kerala.
2. The differently abled parents for the marriage of their daughters should be eligible to apply under the scheme.
3. While submitting the application for marriage assistance the bride should have completed 18 years of age.
4. The combined annual family income should not exceed ₹1,00,000/-.
**Note 01:** Applications for assistance can be submitted for the marriage of two daughters.
**Note 02:** The financial assistance for a second child's marriage can be submitted only after 3 years after the initial grant of allowance.
**Note 03:** After receiving the financial aid as per these terms, if the marriage has to be separated for any reason and the girl has to marry a second time, then the financial aid can be given for the second marriage. In such cases, the annual income of the family should be calculated taking into account the compensation received from the ex-husband.
**Note 04:** If the applicant with disabilities dies before the marriage of the daughters, the said financial assistance can be given to the elder member of the family or any other member of the family who is responsible for conducting the marriage.
**Note 05:** In case the applicant PWD dies after the marriage of his daughter but before receiving financial assistance, the senior member of the family or the married member or the individual can be given financial assistance on adequate security.
